Within-one accuracy is too easy because near misses receive credit and the majority class dominates; worst-class accuracy is too noisy because the rarest class has only two examples. Exact accuracy, macro-F1, and weighted \k{appa} are therefore the identifiable metrics under our operational rule. Third, ranking claims become more defensible only after this metric-identifiability audit: Bradley--Terry, Borda, and Ranked Pairs agree on the identifiable metric subset, while the full five-metric sweep produces disagreement on the closest pair. The contribution is not a new leaderboard, but a reporting discipline for supervised financial benchmarks whose gold labels exist and whose evaluation ruler still requires governance.

AI.tldr: 本研究揭示了在金融NLP基准评测中，标注金标准并非客观真理——实验证明，问题措辞、指标选择和聚合策略都会显著改变评测结果。基于JF-ICR数据集的多维度分析发现：不同措辞的评分标准间一致性仅70%-83.4%，且多数变化集中在+1/0的隐性承诺边界附近；多数指标在偏态分布下失效，仅有精确准确率、宏F1和加权Kappa三个指标可被"识别"；而完整的五指标排名会产生最大分歧。本文贡献不在于新的排行榜，而是一套针对监督式金融基准评测的报告纪律。
AI.motivation: 挑战金融NLP基准评测中"金标准即客观"的隐含假设，揭示评测标尺本身（如评分标准措辞、指标选择、聚合策略）对模型评估结果和排名结论的系统性影响，提升金融NLP模型选择和部署决策的可靠性。
AI.method: 基于日本金融隐性承诺识别（JF-ICR）基准数据集（253个测试样本 × 4个前沿LLM × 5种评分标准 × 3个温度参数 × 5个序数指标），采用多维度交叉分析框架，系统评估评分标准措辞（R2-R3一致性分析）、指标可识别性（基于操作规则筛选有效指标）以及聚合方法（Bradley-Terry、Borda、Ranked Pairs三种排名方法的比较）对评测结果的影响。
AI.result: （1）评分标准措辞改变模型标签：R2-R3间一致性仅70%-83.4%，变化主要集中在+1/0的隐性承诺边界附近；（2）多数指标在JF-ICR类别分布下失效：类内准确率因"接近正确"获得分数且多数类主导而过于简单，最差类准确率因最稀有类仅有2个样本而过于嘈杂；（3）仅精确准确率、宏F1和加权Kappa可被识别；（4）在可识别指标子集上，三种排名方法达成一致，而全五指标评估产生最大分歧。
AI.conclusion: 本文的核心贡献不是提供一个新排行榜，而是为存在金标签且仍需治理评测标尺的监督式金融基准评测建立了一套报告纪律——包括对评分标准措辞的敏感性报告、指标可识别性审计以及排名结论的稳健性验证，以提升金融NLP基准评测的科学性和可复现性。

title: Unsafe and Unused? A History of Utility Code in Mature Open Source Projects
summary: Filenames are a concise means of conveying information about source code to fellow developers. One such convention is util. Commonly understood to stand for "utility", filenames with the letters util are often an indication that the file contains code that may be broadly useful or reusable. Some projects use this convention heavily, for example, the Apache Tomcat server contains 925 files with util in the path name, which is 17.9% of all source code files in the tree. While the intent of the name may be to prevent duplicate code and reduce workload, what actually happens to util code over time? Do projects move away from util code as they mature? Are util files being used by fellow colleagues, or maintained and used by their author? The goal of our work is to help developers avoid creating unsafe and unused util files when developing their projects. We conducted a longitudinal mining study of the Git repositories of seven open source projects that have a long development history (Linux kernel, Django, FFmpeg, httpd, Struts, systemd, Tomcat). We analyzed how util usage, complexity, developer collaboration, and security are potentially correlated within these projects. Our longitudinal analysis was measured at 30-day intervals throughout the entire history of each project, resulting in 1773 snapshots over 147 project-years of development. We conducted rename tracking at every 30-day snapshot to examine util files over their entire lifetime in a codebase. For example, we found that a util file can be as much as 2.75 times more likely to be involved in a vulnerability than non-util files. While every project can adopt their own naming conventions, the ubiquity and longevity of util files shows a broader developer intent that is useful for understanding the socio-technical nature of software development.

AI.tldr: 本文通过纵向挖掘7个大型开源项目的Git仓库，研究源代码中"util"命名文件的演变规律。研究发现，util文件比非util文件更易涉及安全漏洞（高达2.75倍），且在不同项目中普遍存在并长期保留。
AI.motivation: 开发者常使用"util"命名文件以暗示其通用性和可重用性，但这种命名惯例是否真的有效？随着项目演化，util文件是否得到良好维护？是否容易被其他开发者使用？作者希望帮助开发者避免创建不安全且无人使用的util文件。
AI.method: 对7个开源项目（Linux内核、Django、FFmpeg、httpd、Struts、systemd、Tomcat）进行纵向挖掘研究，覆盖147个项目年。每30天提取一次快照，共1773个快照，追踪rename操作以分析util文件在整个生命周期中的使用、复杂度、开发者协作及安全性。
AI.result: util文件比非util文件更可能涉及安全漏洞，最高可达2.75倍。util命名惯例在项目中普遍存在且长期保留，例如Tomcat有17.9%的文件路径包含"util"。
AI.conclusion: 尽管各项目可自行制定命名规范，但util文件的普遍存在性和长期性反映了开发者的一种广泛意图，这有助于理解软件开发的社技术本质。同时提醒开发者注意util文件可能带来的安全风险。

title: HATS: An Open data set Integrating Human Perception Applied to the Evaluation of Automatic Speech Recognition Metrics
summary: Conventionally, Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems are evaluated on their ability to correctly recognize each word contained in a speech signal. In this context, the word error rate (WER) metric is the reference for evaluating speech transcripts. Several studies have shown that this measure is too limited to correctly evaluate an ASR system, which has led to the proposal of other variants of metrics (weighted WER, BERTscore, semantic distance, etc.). However, they remain system-oriented, even when transcripts are intended for humans. In this paper, we firstly present Human Assessed Transcription Side-by-side (HATS), an original French manually annotated data set in terms of human perception of transcription errors produced by various ASR systems. 143 humans were asked to choose the best automatic transcription out of two hypotheses. We investigated the relationship between human preferences and various ASR evaluation metrics, including lexical and embedding-based ones, the latter being those that correlate supposedly the most with human perception.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了HATS数据集，一个法语人工标注的ASR转录错误感知数据集，通过143名人类评估者对两种自动转录进行偏好选择，并研究了各种ASR评估指标（包括词级别和嵌入级别）与人类感知的相关性，发现现有指标与人类判断存在差距。
AI.motivation: 传统ASR评估指标（如WER）过于局限，无法准确评估ASR系统，尤其当转录结果面向人类使用时。现有改进指标仍以系统为导向，缺乏从人类感知角度评估转录质量的标准。
AI.method: 构建了HATS法语数据集，由143名人类评估者对两个ASR系统的转录假设进行偏好选择。然后分析各种ASR评估指标（包括词级别的WER、加权WER，以及嵌入级别的BERTscore、语义距离等）与人类偏好之间的相关性。
AI.result: 通过人类偏好数据与多种评估指标的对比分析，揭示了现有指标（包括嵌入类指标）与人类真实感知之间的相关性程度。
AI.conclusion: 现有ASR评估指标即使是嵌入类指标，与人类感知的相关性仍有限，需要从人类认知角度开发更合理的评估方法。

title: AG-TAL: Anatomically-Guided Topology-Aware Loss for Multiclass Segmentation of the Circle of Willis Using Large-Scale Multi-Center Datasets
comment: 11 pages, 5 figures, submitted to IEEE JBHI
summary: Accurate multiclass segmentation of the Circle of Willis (CoW) is essential for neurovascular disease management but remains challenging due to complex vascular topology and variable morphology. Existing deep learning methods often suffer from vascular discontinuities and inter-class misclassification, while current topological loss functions incur prohibitive computational costs in 3D multiclass settings. To address these limitations, we propose an Anatomically-Guided Topology-Aware Loss (AG-TAL) and introduce a large-scale, multi-center CoW dataset with unified annotations to facilitate robust model training. AG-TAL specifically integrates a radius-aware Dice loss to address class imbalance in small vessels, a breakage-aware clDice loss that utilizes group convolutions to efficiently preserve local connectivity, and an adjacency-aware co-occurrence loss that leverages anatomical priors to enforce distinct boundaries between neighboring arteries. Evaluated using 5-fold cross-validation, AG-TAL achieved an average Dice score of 80.85% for all CoW arteries, with small arteries notably higher by 1.05-3.09% compared to state-of-the-art methods. Across six independent datasets, the performance of AG-TAL achieved Dice scores ranging from 74.46% to 81.17% for all CoW arteries, with improvements of 2.20% to 9.98% for small arteries compared to other methods. This study demonstrates the superiority of AG-TAL in identifying multiclass CoW arteries and its ability to generalize well to multiple independent datasets. Furthermore, reliability analyses and clinical applications in an Alzheimer's disease cohort validate the AG-TAL's robustness and its potential for discovering imaging-based morphological biomarkers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种解剖引导的拓扑感知损失函数（AG-TAL），用于解决脑底动脉环（CoW）多类分割中血管不连续和类间误分类问题，并引入了一个大规模多中心CoW数据集。AG-TAL包含半径感知Dice损失、断点感知clDice损失和邻接感知共现损失，在多个数据集上取得了优于现有方法的分割效果，尤其对小动脉的分割提升显著（1.05-9.98%）。
AI.motivation: 脑底动脉环（CoW）的多类分割对神经血管疾病管理至关重要，但现有深度学习方法存在血管不连续和类间误分类问题，且当前的拓扑损失函数在3D多类场景下计算成本过高。
AI.method: 提出AG-TAL，包含三个组件：1）半径感知Dice损失——解决小血管的类别不平衡问题；2）断点感知clDice损失——利用组卷积高效保持局部连通性；3）邻接感知共现损失——利用解剖先验强化相邻动脉之间的边界区分。同时引入大规模多中心CoW数据集并统一标注。
AI.result: 5折交叉验证中所有CoW动脉平均Dice达80.85%，小动脉提升1.05-3.09%；在6个独立数据集上，所有CoW动脉Dice为74.46-81.17%，小动脉提升2.20-9.98%。
AI.conclusion: AG-TAL在多类CoW动脉识别上优于现有方法，具有良好的泛化能力，并在阿尔茨海默病队列中验证了其稳健性和发现影像学生物标志物的潜力。

title: Residual Gaussian Splatting for Ultra Sparse-View CBCT Reconstruction
summary: While 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) offers explicit and efficient scene representations for cone-beam computed tomography reconstruction, conventional photometric optimization inherently suffers from spectral bias under ultra sparse-view conditions, leading to over-smoothing and a loss of high-frequency anatomical details. Since wavelet transforms provide rich high-frequency information and have been widely utilized to enhance sparse reconstruction, this work integrates wavelet multi-resolution analysis with 3DGS. To circumvent the mathematical mismatch between the strict non-negativity of physical X-ray attenuation and the bipolar nature of high-frequency wavelet coefficients, we propose Residual Gaussian Splatting (RGS). Methodologically, we introduce a spectrally-decoupled Gaussian representation that stratifies the volumetric field into a geometric base component and a residual detail component. This decomposition systematically transforms explicit high-frequency fitting into a physically consistent, implicit residual compensation task. Furthermore, we devise a spectral-spatial collaborative optimization strategy to coordinate the interplay between geometric anchoring and texture refinement, effectively preventing spectral crosstalk. Extensive experiments on clinical datasets demonstrate that RGS enables the reconstructed images to capture highly refined geometric textures. It successfully resolves the trade-off between artifact suppression and detail preservation, yielding superior visual fidelity in complex trabecular and vascular structures compared to existing neural rendering baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出残差高斯泼溅（RGS），将小波多分辨率分析与3DGS结合，通过频谱解耦的高斯表示将体场分解为几何基成分和残差细节成分，解决超稀疏视角下CT重建过平滑和细节丢失问题。
AI.motivation: 传统3DGS在超稀疏视角CT重建中存在频谱偏差，导致过平滑和丢失高频解剖细节；小波变换提供丰富高频信息，但物理X射线衰减非负性与高频小波系数双极性存在数学不匹配。
AI.method: 提出频谱解耦高斯表示，将体场分解为几何基成分和残差细节成分，将显式高频拟合转化为物理一致的隐式残差补偿任务；设计频谱-空间协同优化策略来协调几何锚定与纹理细化。
AI.result: 在临床数据集上，RGS重建图像能捕捉高度精细的几何纹理，在复杂骨小梁和血管结构中相比现有神经渲染基线实现了更优的视觉保真度。
AI.conclusion: RGS成功解决了伪影抑制与细节保持之间的权衡问题，在超稀疏视角CT重建中实现了卓越的视觉质量。

title: Robust Learning on Heterogeneous Graphs with Heterophily: A Graph Structure Learning Approach
summary: Heterogeneous graphs with heterophily have emerged as a powerful abstraction for modeling complex real-world systems, where nodes of different types and labels interact in diverse and often non-homophilous ways. Despite recent advances, robust representation learning for such graphs remains largely unexplored, particularly in the presence of noisy or misleading connectivity. In this work, we investigate this problem and identify structural noise as a critical challenge that significantly degrades model performance. To address this issue, we propose a unified framework, Heterogeneous Graph Unified Learning (HGUL), which jointly handles heterophily and noisy graph structures. The framework consists of three complementary modules: a kNN-based graph construction module that recovers reliable local neighborhoods, a graph structure learning module that adaptively refines the adjacency by filtering noisy edges, and a heterogeneous affinity learning module that captures class-level relationships via an extended affinity matrix derived from a polynomial graph kernel. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that HGUL consistently outperforms existing methods on clean graphs and maintains strong robustness under varying levels of structural noise. The results further underscore the importance of jointly modeling heterophily and noise in heterogeneous graph learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HGUL框架，联合处理异构图中的异质性和结构噪声，包含kNN图构建、图结构学习和异质亲和力学习三个模块，在多个数据集上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 异构图中的异质性（heterophily）和结构噪声会严重损害模型性能，现有方法未能同时解决这两个问题。
AI.method: 提出HGUL框架，包含三个互补模块：(1) kNN图构建模块恢复可靠局部邻域；(2) 图结构学习模块自适应精炼邻接矩阵；(3) 异质亲和力学习模块通过多项式图核的扩展亲和矩阵捕获类别级关系。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，HGUL在干净图上持续优于现有方法，并在不同结构噪声水平下保持强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 联合建模异质性和噪声对于异构图学习至关重要，HGUL为这一方向提供了有效框架。

title: AppTek Call-Center Dialogues: A Multi-Accent Long-Form Benchmark for English ASR
summary: Evaluating English ASR systems for conversational AI applications remains difficult, as many publicly available corpora are either pre-segmented into short segments, consist of read or prepared speech, or lack explicit dialect annotations to evaluate robustness for a diverse user base. This work presents the AppTek Call-Center Dialogues corpus, a collection of spontaneous, role-played agent-customer conversations spanning fourteen English accents covering sixteen service-oriented scenarios. The dataset was commissioned specifically for evaluation and none of the audio or text was publicly available prior to release, reducing the risk of overlap with existing large-scale pretraining corpora. We benchmark a set of open-source ASR systems under different segmentation approaches. Results show substantial variation across accents and segmentation methods, indicating that good performance on general American English benchmarks does not necessarily generalize to other accents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AppTek Call-Center Dialogues语料库，包含14种英语口音的客服对话，用于评估ASR系统在不同口音和分割方法下的表现。结果显示，口音和分割方法对ASR性能有显著影响，通用美式英语的基准性能不能推广到其他口音。
AI.motivation: 现有的英语ASR评估语料库存在预分割、非自发语音、缺乏口音标注等问题，难以评估对话AI应用中的真实表现和多样用户群体的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建AppTek Call-Center Dialogues语料库，包含14种英语口音、16种服务场景的自发角色扮演对话；采用不同分割方法对多个开源ASR系统进行基准测试。
AI.result: 不同口音和分割方法下ASR性能差异显著；通用美式英语的基准性能不能很好地泛化到其他口音。
AI.conclusion: 口音多样性对ASR系统评估至关重要，现有基准测试存在局限性，需要更多样化的评估语料库来真实反映ASR在对话AI中的表现。

title: Stable but Wrong: An Inference Limit in Galactic Archaeology
summary: Statistical inference in observational science typically relies on a fundamental assumption: as sample size increases and uncertainties decrease, the inferred results should converge to the true physical quantities. This assumption underpins the notion that big data lead to more reliable conclusions. In Galactic archaeology, stellar ages inferred from spectroscopic surveys are widely used to reconstruct the formation history of the Milky Way disk. The age metallicity relation (AMR) and its derived formation timescale are often regarded as key physical diagnostics of early disk evolution. This interpretation carries an implicit premise: that observational quality does not introduce systematic bias into age inference. Here we show that this premise may fail. Using a large sample of subgiant stars, we identify a region in the observational quality parameter space (signal-to-noise ratio and parallax precision) where the inferred formation timescale exhibits a systematic offset of 0.5-1 Gyr relative to an independent asteroseismic reference, while the statistical uncertainties remain small, thus producing a stable-but-wrong inference state.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，在银河考古学中，当观测质量（信噪比和视差精度）处于特定区域时，从恒星年龄推断出的盘形成时标会产生0.5-1 Gyr的系统偏差，尽管统计误差很小，导致"稳定但错误"的推断状态，挑战了"大数据带来更可靠结论"的传统假设。
AI.motivation: 传统统计推断假设样本量增大、不确定性减小会使结果收敛到真实值。作者希望检验这一假设在银河考古学中是否成立，特别是观测质量是否会系统性地影响恒星年龄推断。
AI.method: 利用大面积亚巨星样本，在观测质量参数空间（信噪比和视差精度）中识别特定区域，并将推断的形成时标与独立的星震学参考值进行比较。
AI.result: 在特定观测质量区域，推断的形成时标表现出0.5-1 Gyr的系统偏移，而统计误差仍然很小，呈现"稳定但错误"的状态。
AI.conclusion: 观测质量可能引入系统性偏差，导致统计上稳定但事实上错误的推断结果，挑战了大数据必然带来更可靠结论的传统观念。

title: Revealing the Impact of Visual Text Style on Attribute-based Descriptions Produced by Large Visual Language Models
comment: Accepted by ICMR 2026. Code is available at https://github.com/XiaomengWang-AI/The-Impact-of-Visual-Text-style-on-Attribute-based-Descriptions-Produced-by-LVLMs
summary: When the visual style of text is considered, a wide variety can be observed in font, color, and size. However, when a word is read, its meaning is independent of the style in which it has been written or rendered. In this paper, we investigate whether, and how, the style in which a word is visualized in an image impacts the description that a Large Visual Language Model (LVLM) provides for the concept to which that word refers. Specifically, we investigate how functional text styles (readability-oriented, e.g., black sans-serif) versus decorative styles (display-oriented, e.g., colored cursive/script) affect LVLMs' descriptions of a concept in terms of the attributes of that concept. Our experiments study the situation in which the LVLM is able to correctly identify the concept referred to by a visual text, i.e., by a word or words rendered as an image, and in which the visual text style should not influence the attribute-based description that the LVLM produces. Our experimental results reveal that even when the concept is correctly identified, text style influences the model's attribute-based descriptions of the concept. Our findings demonstrate non-trivial style leakage from text style into semantic inference and motivate style-aware evaluation and mitigation for LVLM-based multimedia systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）在识别图像中文字概念时，其描述的属性是否会受到文字视觉风格（如可读性风格 vs. 装饰性风格）的影响。实验表明，即使模型正确识别了概念，文字风格仍会"泄露"到语义推理中，影响模型的属性描述。
AI.motivation: 探究文字视觉风格（字体、颜色、大小等）是否以及如何影响LVLM对概念的属性描述——尽管从人类认知角度，文字意义独立于其视觉呈现风格。
AI.method: 设计实验，对比功能性文本风格（可读性导向，如黑色无衬线字体）与装饰性风格（展示导向，如彩色草书/手写体）对LVLM描述概念属性的影响，控制LVLM能正确识别概念这一前提条件。
AI.result: 即使模型正确识别了文字所指的概念，文本风格仍然显著影响模型对概念的属性描述，存在"风格泄露"现象。
AI.conclusion: LVLM存在从文本风格到语义推理的非平凡风格泄露，提示需要开发风格感知的评估方法和缓解策略。

title: Leading Across the Spectrum of Human-AI Relationships: A Conceptual Framework for Increasingly Heterogeneous Teams
summary:
What shapes a consequential decision when human and artificial intelligence work on it together? The answer is becoming harder to see. A decision may look human-led after AI has set the frame, or appear automated while human judgment still carries decisive force. This paper offers a leadership-facing spectrum to see those relationships within a bounded mandate: Pure Human, Centaur (human-dominant, with AI in the loop), Co-equal, Minotaur (AI-dominant, with humans in the loop), and Pure AI.
  The spectrum asks where leadership work occurs: who frames the problem, who redirects the work, and who can answer for what follows. The five positions are landmarks that help leaders recognize configurations as they layer, drift, or change in a single decision. The central risk is misrecognition: leaders may keep a human-centered story in place after decision-shaping authority has shifted elsewhere. They may believe oversight remains meaningful when it has become ceremonial, or keep humans in the loop when their involvement could make the decision worse. The framework introduces co-adaptability, the capacity of a configuration to improve as human and non-human participants adjust together, and places it within heterogeneous teaming, where participants may vary by number, substrate, model architecture, capability, speed, memory, and form of participation.
  The aim is practical: to help strategic leaders and those designing or deploying AI systems recognize the configuration at work, notice when it shifts, and judge whether it fits the decision before them. These configurations will shape how power, responsibility, and trust are distributed in organizational life. Whether the futures they help create remain governable and worth inhabiting will depend on leaders who can see, early enough, where and how consequential decisions are actually being shaped.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个人类与AI协作决策的配置光谱（纯人类→半人马→对等→弥诺陶洛斯→纯AI），帮助领导者识别在决策中谁真正掌握塑造权、导向权和问责权，核心风险在于"误认"——领导者可能沿用人类主导叙事，而决策权力已悄然转移。
AI.motivation: 随着AI深度嵌入决策过程，决策的实际塑造者变得模糊不清——表面由人主导实则已被AI框定、表面自动化却仍受人类判断支配。领导者亟需一个框架来看清这些关系，避免在权力已转移的情况下仍维持错误的认知。
AI.method: 提出一个面向领导者的五段式配置光谱（Pure Human / Centaur / Co-equal / Minotaur / Pure AI），从三个关键维度（谁框定问题、谁引导工作方向、谁为后果负责）来定位决策的"领导工作"实际落在何处，并引入"共适应性"和"异质团队协作"概念分析动态变化。
AI.result: 识别出三种典型误认风险：1) 决策塑造权已转移但维持人类中心叙事；2) 监督变成仪式性存在；3) 不应纳入人类时仍强行保留人在环路中。框架揭示了配置会分层、漂移和变化，领导者需要动态识别。
AI.conclusion: 该光谱框架旨在帮助战略领导者和AI系统设计者看清实际决策配置、察觉变化时点并判断适切性。决策配置将深刻影响组织中的权力、责任与信任分配，未来是否可治理且值得栖居，取决于领导者能否及早识别决策的真正塑造方式。

title: A Pattern Language for Resilient Visual Agents
comment: Accepted to the 23rd International Conference on Software Architecture (ICSA 2026), New and Emerging Ideas Track. 5 pages, 1 figure
summary: Integrating multimodal foundation models into enterprise ecosystems presents a fundamental software architecture challenge. Architects must balance competing quality attributes: the high latency and non-determinism of vision language action (VLA) models versus the strict determinism and real-time performance required by enterprise control loops. In this study, we propose an architectural pattern language for visual agents that separates fast, deterministic reflexes from slow, probabilistic supervision. It consists of four architectural design patterns: (1) Hybrid Affordance Integration, (2) Adaptive Visual Anchoring, (3) Visual Hierarchy Synthesis, and (4) Semantic Scene Graph.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向企业级视觉代理（Visual Agents）的架构模式语言，通过将快速、确定性的“反射”机制与慢速、概率性的“监督”机制分离，以应对多模态基础模型在企业生态中集成时面临的高延迟、非确定性与实时性、确定性之间的矛盾。该模式语言包含四种架构设计模式：混合能力集成、自适应视觉锚定、视觉层次合成和语义场景图。
AI.motivation: 企业级系统对控制回路有严格的实时性和确定性要求，而多模态基础模型（尤其是VLA模型）存在高延迟和非确定性输出，两者之间存在根本性的软件架构矛盾。现有架构方法难以同时兼顾这两类竞争性质量属性。
AI.method: 提出一种架构模式语言，核心思想是将视觉代理系统分解为两个层面：快速、确定性的“反射”机制（处理即时、可预测的低级控制任务）和慢速、概率性的“监督”机制（处理需要高层语义理解的决策任务）。具体包含四种设计模式：(1) Hybrid Affordance Integration（混合能力集成），(2) Adaptive Visual Anchoring（自适应视觉锚定），(3) Visual Hierarchy Synthesis（视觉层次合成），(4) Semantic Scene Graph（语义场景图）。
AI.result: 论文提出了一套系统的架构模式语言，为在企业环境中整合多模态基础模型提供了可复用的设计解决方案，平衡了实时性与智能性之间的张力。
AI.conclusion: 该架构模式语言为企业级视觉代理系统的设计提供了结构化的指导，通过反射-监督分离的架构思想，有效缓解了多模态基础模型与严格企业控制需求之间的冲突，为实际工程落地提供了可行的设计路径。

title: APPSI-139: A Parallel Corpus of English Application Privacy Policy Summarization and Interpretation
summary: Privacy policies are essential for users to understand how service providers handle their personal data. However, these documents are often long and complex, as well as filled with technobabble and legalese, causing users to unknowingly accept terms that may even contradict the law. While summarizing and interpreting these privacy policies is crucial, there is a lack of high-quality English parallel corpus optimized for legal clarity and readability. To address this issue, we introduce APPSI-139, a high-quality English privacy policy corpus meticulously annotated by domain experts, specifically designed for summarization and interpretation tasks. The corpus includes 139 English privacy policies, 15,692 rewritten parallel corpora, and 36,351 fine-grained annotation labels across 11 data practice categories. Concurrently, we propose TCSI-pp-V2, a hybrid privacy policy summarization and interpretation framework that employs an alternating training strategy and coordinates multiple expert modules to effectively balance computational efficiency and accuracy. Experimental results show that the hybrid summarization system built on APPSI-139 corpus and the TCSI-pp-V2 framework outperform large language models, such as GPT-4o and LLaMA-3-70B, in terms of readability and reliability. The source code and dataset are available at https://github.com/EnlightenedAI/APPSI-139.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了高质量的英文隐私政策语料库APPSI-139（含139份政策、15,692条改写语料及36,351个细粒度标注），并提出了混合式摘要与解读框架TCSI-pp-V2，实验表明该方案在可读性和可靠性上优于GPT-4o等大语言模型。
AI.motivation: 隐私政策通常冗长复杂、充满技术术语和法律行话，用户常在不了解的情况下接受可能违法的条款。现有语料库缺乏针对法律清晰度和可读性优化的高质量英文平行语料。
AI.method: 1）构建APPSI-139语料库，由领域专家精细标注11类数据实践类别；2）提出TCSI-pp-V2混合框架，采用交替训练策略协调多个专家模块，平衡计算效率与准确性。
AI.result: 基于APPSI-139和TCSI-pp-V2构建的混合摘要系统在可读性和可靠性上均优于GPT-4o和LLaMA-3-70B等大语言模型。
AI.conclusion: 高质量的专用语料库与混合框架相结合，能够在隐私政策摘要与解读任务上超越通用大语言模型，为提升隐私政策的用户可理解性提供了有效方案。

title: Detecting is Easy, Adapting is Hard: Local Expert Growth for Visual Model-Based Reinforcement Learning under Distribution Shift
summary: Visual model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) agents can perform well on the training distribution, but often break down once the test environment shifts. In visual MBRL, recognizing that a shift has occurred is often the easier part; the harder part is turning that recognition into useful action-level correction. We study several ways of responding to shift, including planning penalties, direct fine-tuning, global residual correction, and coarse gating. In our experiments, these approaches either do not improve closed-loop control or hurt in-distribution (ID) performance. Based on these negative results, we propose JEPA-Indexed Local Expert Growth. The method uses a frozen JEPA representation only for problem indexing, while cluster-specific residual experts add local action corrections on top of the original controller. The baseline controller itself is not modified. Using paired-bootstrap evaluation, we find that the original naive-preference variant is not stable under stricter testing. In contrast, the harder-pair variant produces statistically significant OOD improvements on all four evaluated shift conditions while preserving ID performance. The learned experts also remain useful when the same shift is encountered again, which supports the view of adaptation as incremental knowledge growth rather than repeated full retraining. We further show that automatic ID rejection can be achieved with simple density models, whereas fine-grained discrimination among OOD sub-families is limited by the representation. Overall, the results indicate that, for visual MBRL under distribution shift, the main challenge is not simply noticing that the environment has changed, but applying the right local action correction after the change has been recognized.

AI.tldr: 针对视觉MBRL在分布偏移下表现不佳的问题，本文提出JEPA-Indexed Local Expert Growth方法，通过冻结JEPA表示进行问题索引，并添加聚类残差专家进行局部动作修正，在保持分布内性能的同时显著提升分布外性能。
AI.motivation: 视觉MBRL在训练分布上表现良好，但测试环境偏移时常失效；识别偏移相对容易，但将识别转化为有效的动作级修正才是难点。
AI.method: 提出JEPA-Indexed Local Expert Growth方法：使用冻结的JEPA表示仅用于问题索引，集群特定的残差专家在原始控制器之上添加局部动作修正，不修改基线控制器本身。
AI.result: harder-pair变体在四种偏移条件下均产生统计显著的OOD改进，同时保持ID性能；学习到的专家在重复遇到相同偏移时仍然有效；自动ID拒绝可通过简单密度模型实现。
AI.conclusion: 视觉MBRL在分布偏移下的主要挑战不是察觉环境变化，而是在变化发生后应用正确的局部动作修正。

title: RIHA: Report-Image Hierarchical Alignment for Radiology Report Generation
comment: Accepted by Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics (JBHI)
summary: Radiology report generation (RRG) has emerged as a promising approach to alleviate radiologists' workload and reduce human errors by automatically generating diagnostic reports from medical images. A key challenge in RRG is achieving fine-grained alignment between complex visual features and the hierarchical structure of long-form radiology reports. Although recent methods have improved image-text representation learning, they often treat reports as flat sequences, overlooking their structured sections and semantic hierarchies. This simplification hinders precise cross-modal alignment and weakens RRG accuracy. To address this challenge, we propose RIHA (Report-Image Hierarchical Alignment Transformer), a novel end-to-end framework that performs multi-level alignment between radiological images and their corresponding reports across paragraph, sentence, and word levels. This hierarchical alignment enables more precise cross-modal mapping, essential for capturing the nuanced semantics embedded in clinical narratives. Specifically, RIHA introduces a Visual Feature Pyramid (VFP) to extract multi-scale visual features and a Text Feature Pyramid (TFP) to represent multi-granularity textual structures. These components are integrated through a Cross-modal Hierarchical Alignment (CHA) module, leveraging optimal transport to effectively align visual and textual features across various levels. Furthermore, we incorporate Relative Positional Encoding (RPE) into the decoder to model spatial and semantic relationships among tokens, enhancing the token-level alignment between visual features and generated text. Extensive experiments on two benchmark chest X-ray datasets, IU-Xray and MIMIC-CXR, demonstrate that RIHA outperforms existing state-of-the-art models in both natural language generation and clinical efficacy metrics.

AI.tldr: 提出RIHA框架，通过多层级（段落、句子、单词）视觉-文本对齐，结合视觉特征金字塔、文本特征金字塔和最优传输跨模态对齐模块，在胸部X光报告生成任务上超越SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将放射学报告视为扁平序列，忽略了其结构化章节和语义层级，导致跨模态对齐不精确，影响报告生成准确性。
AI.method: 提出RIHA框架，包含视觉特征金字塔（VFP）提取多尺度视觉特征、文本特征金字塔（TFP）表示多粒度文本结构，通过跨模态层级对齐（CHA）模块利用最优传输实现多层级对齐，并在解码器中引入相对位置编码（RPE）增强词级对齐。
AI.result: 在IU-Xray和MIMIC-CXR两个胸部X光基准数据集上，RIHA在自然语言生成和临床效能指标上均优于现有SOTA模型。
AI.conclusion: 层级化的视觉-文本对齐策略能有效提升放射学报告生成的精度，最优传输机制是跨模态对齐的有效工具。

title: InteractWeb-Bench: Can Multimodal Agent Escape Blind Execution in Interactive Website Generation?
summary: With the advancement of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) and coding agents, the website development has shifted from manual programming to agent-based project-level code synthesis. Existing benchmarks rely on idealized assumptions, especially for well-structured, information-rich inputs and static execution settings. In contrast, real-world development is constrained by a critical bottleneck: the semantic misalignment between ambiguous, low-quality instructions from non-expert users and model understanding, which results in a failure mode that we term blind execution. To address this gap, we introduce InteractWeb-Bench, the first multimodal interactive benchmark for website generation under non-expert low-code user conditions. InteractWeb-Bench introduces four types of user agents and persona-driven instruction perturbations to systematically simulate diverse user behaviors, including ambiguity, redundancy, and contradiction, grounded in requirement engineering defect taxonomies. We develop an interactive execution environment for agents, featuring a unified action space comprising Clarify, Implement, Verify, and Submit, enabling iterative intent refinement, code synthesis, and visual feedback-based validation. Extensive experiments and analysis reveal that frontier MLLM-based agents remain trapped in blind execution, exposing limitations in intent recognition and adaptive interaction.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了InteractWeb-Bench，一个在非专家低代码用户条件下用于网站生成的多模态交互式基准测试，旨在解决用户模糊指令与模型理解之间的语义错配问题（盲执行）。该基准通过四种用户代理和需求工程缺陷扰动模拟用户行为，并设计了包含澄清、实现、验证和提交的统一行动空间。实验表明前沿MLLM代理仍陷入盲执行困境。
AI.motivation: 现有网站开发基准基于理想化假设（结构化、信息丰富的输入和静态执行环境），但现实世界中非专家用户的指令常存在模糊、低质量等问题，导致模型"盲执行"。作者旨在弥合这一差距。
AI.method: 1) 构建InteractWeb-Bench基准，包含四种用户代理（模拟不同用户行为）；2) 引入基于需求工程缺陷分类法的指令扰动（模糊、冗余、矛盾）；3) 设计交互式执行环境，统一行动空间包括Clarify（澄清）、Implement（实现）、Verify（验证）、Submit（提交），支持迭代意图精炼、代码合成和视觉反馈验证。
AI.result: 实验表明前沿MLLM代理在非专家低代码用户条件下仍存在盲执行问题，暴露出意图识别和自适应交互能力的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 现有MLLM代理在真实世界的模糊、低质量指令场景下表现不足，需要更强的意图理解和交互能力才能应对实际开发需求。

title: JaiTTS: A Thai Voice Cloning Model
summary: We present JaiTTS-v1.0, a state-of-the-art Thai voice cloning text-to-speech model built through continual training on a large Thai-centric speech corpus. The model architecture is adapted from VoxCPM, a tokenizer-free autoregressive TTS model. JaiTTS-v1.0 directly processes numerals and Thai-English code-switching, which is very common in realistic settings, without explicit text normalization. We test the models on short-duration speech generation and long-duration speech generation, which reflects many real-world use cases. JaiTTS-v1.0 achieves a state-of-the-art CER of 1.94\%, surpassing the human ground truth of 1.98% for short-duration tasks while performing on par with human ground truth for long-duration tasks. In human judgment evaluations, our model wins 283 of 400 pairwise comparisons against commercial flagships, with only 58 losses.

AI.tldr: JaiTTS-v1.0是一个基于VoxCPM改进的泰语语音克隆TTS模型，通过大规模泰语语料库持续训练，无需文本归一化即可处理数字和泰英混合编码，在短时长任务上CER达1.94%（超越人类真实录音的1.98%），并在人评测试中击败商业旗舰模型。
AI.motivation: 现有泰语TTS模型难以处理数字和泰英混合编码等现实场景，需要进行复杂的文本归一化处理，且语音克隆质量有限，因此作者希望构建一个无需显式文本归一化、能直接处理真实场景中常见语言现象的泰语语音克隆模型。
AI.method: 基于VoxCPM无tokenizer自回归TTS架构，通过在大规模泰语语料库上进行持续训练（continual training），使模型直接学会处理数字和泰英混合编码，无需显式文本归一化步骤。
AI.result: 短时长语音生成任务中CER达1.94%，超越人类真实录音（1.98%）；长时长任务表现与人类相当；人类评判中，400次成对比较中获得283胜58负，优于商业旗舰模型。
AI.conclusion: JaiTTS-v1.0在泰语语音克隆TTS任务上达到业界最优水平，尤其在无需文本归一化处理复杂语言现象方面具有显著优势，展示了持续训练策略和适当架构选择的有效性。

title: ChipLingo: A Systematic Training Framework for Large Language Models in EDA
summary:
With the rapid advancement of semiconductor technology, Electronic Design Automation (EDA) has become an increasingly knowledge-intensive and document-driven engineering domain. Although large language models (LLMs) have shown strong general capabilities, applying them directly to EDA remains challenging due to limited domain expertise, cross-tool knowledge confusion, and degraded retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) performance after domain training. To address these issues, this paper presents ChipLingo, a systematic training pipeline for domain-adapted LLMs tailored to EDA scenarios.
  ChipLingo consists of three stages: domain corpus construction with multi-source data curation and QA augmentation, domain-adaptive pretraining with comparisons of different parameter training strategies, and instruction alignment with RAG scenario training under diverse retrieval conditions. We also curate an internal benchmark, EDA-Bench, covering representative EDA tool scenarios, with plans for public release.
  Experiments show that ChipLingo-8B achieves 59.7% accuracy on EDA-Bench, outperforming the same-scale base model and some larger general-purpose models. ChipLingo-32B reaches 70.02%, approaching leading closed-source commercial models. Further analysis shows that QA augmentation improves domain performance, Partial FT offers a better balance between adaptation and general capability retention than LoRA, and explicit RAG scenario training mitigates the decline in retrieval utilization after domain training. These results demonstrate the practical value of systematic domain training for knowledge-intensive EDA tasks and provide a foundation for future EDA agents and external-knowledge-driven systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ChipLingo，一个面向EDA领域的三阶段系统训练流程，包括领域语料构建、领域自适应预训练和指令对齐+RAG场景训练。实验表明ChipLingo-8B/32B在EDA-Bench基准上分别达到59.7%和70.02%的准确率，优于同规模及部分大型通用模型，验证了系统化领域训练在知识密集型EDA任务中的实用价值。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型在通用任务上表现强大，但直接应用于EDA领域面临三个挑战：领域知识不足、跨工具知识混淆、领域训练后检索增强生成（RAG）性能下降。现有工作缺乏针对EDA场景的系统性领域适配方案。
AI.method: ChipLingo三阶段训练流程：(1) 领域语料构建——多源数据整理与QA增强；(2) 领域自适应预训练——比较不同参数训练策略（如LoRA vs Partial FT）；(3) 指令对齐与RAG场景训练——在多样检索条件下进行训练。同时构建了EDA-Bench内部基准。
AI.result: ChipLingo-8B在EDA-Bench上达59.7%准确率，优于同规模基座模型和部分大型通用模型；ChipLingo-32B达70.02%，接近闭源商业模型。消融实验表明：QA增强提升领域性能，Partial FT比LoRA在适配与通用能力保持间更好平衡，显式RAG场景训练缓解了领域训练后的检索利用率下降。
AI.conclusion: 系统化的领域训练流程对知识密集型EDA任务具有显著实用价值，可为未来的EDA智能体和外部知识驱动系统提供基础支撑。

title: World2Minecraft: Occupancy-Driven Simulated Scenes Construction
summary: Embodied intelligence requires high-fidelity simulation environments to support perception and decision-making, yet existing platforms often suffer from data contamination and limited flexibility. To mitigate this, we propose World2Minecraft to convert real-world scenes into structured Minecraft environments based on 3D semantic occupancy prediction. In the reconstructed scenes, we can effortlessly perform downstream tasks such as Vision-Language Navigation(VLN). However, we observe that reconstruction quality heavily depends on accurate occupancy prediction, which remains limited by data scarcity and poor generalization in existing models. We introduce a low-cost, automated, and scalable data acquisition pipeline for creating customized occupancy datasets, and demonstrate its effectiveness through MinecraftOcc, a large-scale dataset featuring 100,165 images from 156 richly detailed indoor scenes. Extensive experiments show that our dataset provides a critical complement to existing datasets and poses a significant challenge to current SOTA methods. These findings contribute to improving occupancy prediction and highlight the value of World2Minecraft in providing a customizable and editable platform for personalized embodied AI research. Project page:https://world2minecraft.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出World2Minecraft框架，通过3D语义占用预测将真实场景转换为可编辑的Minecraft环境，并构建了MinecraftOcc大规模数据集（100,165张图像，156个室内场景），解决现有平台数据污染和灵活性不足的问题，为具身智能研究提供可定制的仿真平台。
AI.motivation: 现有具身智能仿真环境存在数据污染和灵活性有限的问题，且3D语义占用预测受限于数据稀缺和模型泛化能力差，亟需低成本、自动化、可扩展的数据采集方案。
AI.method: 提出World2Minecraft框架：基于3D语义占用预测将真实场景转化为结构化的Minecraft环境；设计自动化数据采集管线，构建MinecraftOcc大规模数据集（156个室内场景，100,165张图像）。
AI.result: MinecraftOcc数据集有效补充了现有数据集，并对当前SOTA方法构成显著挑战；实验证明该数据集能提升占用预测性能，并支持VLN等下游任务。
AI.conclusion: World2Minecraft提供了一个可定制、可编辑的具身AI研究平台，其数据采集管线和数据集有助于推动3D占用预测和个性化具身智能研究的发展。

title: PRTS: A Primitive Reasoning and Tasking System via Contrastive Representations
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models advance robotic control via strong visual-linguistic priors. However, existing VLAs predominantly frame pretraining as supervised behavior cloning, overlooking the fundamental nature of robot learning as a goal-reaching process that requires understanding temporal task progress. We present \textbf{PRTS} (\textbf{P}rimitive \textbf{R}easoning and \textbf{T}asking \textbf{S}ystem), a VLA foundation model that reformulates pretraining through Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning. By treating language instructions as goals and employing contrastive reinforcement learning, PRTS learns a unified embedding space where the inner product of state-action and goal embeddings approximates the log-discounted goal occupancy, the probability of reaching the language-specified goal from the current state-action, quantitatively assessing physical feasibility beyond static semantic matching. PRTS draws this dense goal-reachability supervision directly from offline trajectories without reward annotations, and folds it into the VLM backbone via a role-aware causal mask, incurring negligible overhead over vanilla behavior cloning. This paradigm endows the high-level reasoning system with intrinsic goal reachability awareness, bridging semantic reasoning and temporal task progress, and further benefits goal-conditioned action prediction. Pretrained on 167B tokens of diverse manipulation and embodied-reasoning data, PRTS reaches state-of-the-art performance on LIBERO, LIBERO-Pro, LIBERO-Plus, SimplerEnv, and a real-world suite of 14 complex tasks, with particularly substantial gains on long-horizon, contact-rich, and zero-shot novel-instruction settings, confirming that injecting goal-reachability awareness significantly improves both execution success and long-horizon planning of general-purpose robotic foundation policies.

AI.tldr: PRTS是一个将预训练从行为克隆重构为基于目标的条件强化学习的VLA基础模型，通过对比强化学习学习统一嵌入空间来评估物理可行性，在多个基准上达到SOTA，尤其在长程、接触密集和零样本新指令设置中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型将预训练视为监督行为克隆，忽略了机器人学习的本质是目标到达过程，需要理解时间任务进展。
AI.method: 将语言指令作为目标，采用对比强化学习学习统一嵌入空间；状态-动作与目标嵌入的内积近似对数折扣目标占有率；通过角色感知因果掩码将密集的目标可达性监督融入VLM骨干网络。
AI.result: 在167B token上预训练后，在LIBERO、LIBERO-Pro、LIBERO-Plus、SimplerEnv及14个真实复杂任务上达到SOTA，长程、接触密集和零样本新指令场景增益显著。
AI.conclusion: 注入目标可达性意识显著提升了通用机器人基础策略的执行成功率和长程规划能力。

title: RoadMapper: A Multi-Agent System for Roadmap Generation of Solving Complex Research Problems
summary: People commonly leverage structured content to accelerate knowledge acquisition and research problem solving. Among these, roadmaps guide researchers through hierarchical subtasks to solve complex research problems step by step. Despite progress in structured content generation, the roadmap generation task has remained unexplored. To bridge this gap, we introduce RoadMap, a novel benchmark designed to evaluate the ability of large language models (LLMs) to construct high-quality roadmaps for solving complex research problems. Based on this, we identify three limitations of LLMs: (1) lack of professional knowledge, (2) unreasonable task decomposition, and (3) disordered logical relationships. To address these challenges, we propose RoadMapper, an LLM-based multi-agent system that decomposes the research roadmap generation task into three key stages (i.e., initial generation, knowledge augmentation, and iterative "critique-revise-evaluate"). Extensive experiments demonstrate that RoadMapper can improve LLMs' ability for roadmap generation, while enhancing average performance by more than 8% and saving 84% of the time required by human experts, highlighting its effectiveness and application potential.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RoadMap基准和RoadMapper多智能体系统，用于评估和提升大语言模型生成研究路线图的能力，实验表明该方法在性能提升8%的同时节省84%的人工时间。
AI.motivation: 路线图生成任务此前未被探索，现有LLM在专业知识、任务分解和逻辑关系方面存在局限，因此需要相应的评估基准和解决方案。
AI.method: 提出RoadMapper多智能体系统，将路线图生成分解为初始生成、知识增强和迭代"批评-修改-评估"三个阶段。
AI.result: 相比基线方法平均性能提升超过8%，同时节省84%的人工专家时间。
AI.conclusion: RoadMapper有效提升了LLM生成研究路线图的能力，具有良好的应用潜力。

title: AdaBFL: Multi-Layer Defensive Adaptive Aggregation for Bzantine-Robust Federated Learning
summary: Federated learning (FL) is a popular distributed learning paradigm in machine learning, which enables multiple clients to collaboratively train models under the guidance of a server without exposing private client data. However, FL's decentralized nature makes it vulnerable to poisoning attacks, where malicious clients can submit corrupted models to manipulate the system. To counter such attacks, although various Byzantine-robust methods have been proposed, these methods struggle to provide balanced defense against multiple types of attacks or rely on possessing the dataset in the server. To deal with these drawbacks, thus, we propose an effective multi-layer defensive adaptive aggregation for Bzantine-robust federated learning (AdaBFL) based on a novel three-layer defensive mechanism, which can adaptively adjust the weights of defense algorithms to counter complex attacks. Moreover, we provide convergence properties of our AdaBFL method under the non-convex setting on non-iid data. Comprehensive experiments across multiple datasets validate the superiority of our AdaBFL over the comparable algorithms.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于三层防御机制的自适应拜占庭鲁棒联邦学习聚合方法(AdaBFL)，能动态调整防御算法权重以应对复杂攻击，并在非凸非独立同分布数据上证明了收敛性。
AI.motivation: 现有拜占庭鲁棒方法难以对多种攻击提供均衡防御，或依赖服务器拥有数据集，存在局限性。
AI.method: 提出三层防御机制的自适应聚合框架AdaBFL，动态调整防御算法权重以应对不同类型攻击，并在非凸、非独立同分布数据上给出收敛性证明。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，AdaBFL方法显著优于现有对比算法。
AI.conclusion: AdaBFL能有效提升联邦学习在多类型攻击下的鲁棒性，且不依赖服务器拥有数据集，具有较好的理论保证和实践效果。

title: Assessing Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma Vascular Invasion: the PDACVI Benchmark
summary: Surgical resection remains the only potentially curative treatment for pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC), and eligibility depends on accurate assessment of vascular invasion (VI), i.e., tumor extension into adjacent critical vessels. Despite its importance for preoperative staging and surgical planning, computational VI assessment remains underexplored. Two major challenges are the lack of public datasets and the diagnostic ambiguity at the tumor-vessel interface, which leads to substantial inter-rater variability even among expert radiologists. To address these limitations, we introduce the CURVAS-PDACVI Dataset and Challenge, an open benchmark for uncertainty-aware AI in PDAC staging based on a densely annotated dataset with five independent expert annotations per scan. We also propose a multi-metric evaluation framework that extends beyond spatial overlap to include probabilistic calibration and VI assessment. Evaluation of six state-of-the-art methods shows that strong global volumetric overlap does not necessarily translate into reliable performance at clinically critical tumor-vessel interfaces. In particular, methods optimized for binary segmentation perform competitively on average overlap metrics, but often degrade in high-complexity cases with low expert consensus, either collapsing in volume or overextending at uncertain boundaries. In contrast, methods that model inter-rater disagreement produce better calibrated probabilistic maps and show greater robustness in these ambiguous cases. The benchmark highlights the limitations of volumetric accuracy as a proxy for localized surgical utility, motivating uncertainty-aware probabilistic models for preoperative decision-making.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CURVAS-PDACVI数据集和挑战赛，用于胰腺导管腺癌（PDAC）血管侵犯（VI）的AI评估。该数据集包含每个扫描的5个独立专家标注。评估了6种方法后发现：强全局体积重叠不一定意味着在临床关键的肿瘤-血管界面表现可靠；建模评分者分歧的方法在不确定区域更具鲁棒性。研究揭示了体积准确性作为局部手术效用代理指标的局限性，推动了不确定性感知的概率模型用于术前决策。
AI.motivation: 手术切除是PDAC唯一潜在治愈手段，依赖于准确的血管侵犯评估。然而，计算VI评估缺乏公开数据集，且肿瘤-血管界面的诊断模糊性导致专家间标注差异大。
AI.method: 构建CURVAS-PDACVI数据集（每例5次独立专家标注）；提出包含概率校准和VI评估的多指标评估框架；对6种SOTA方法进行基准测试。
AI.result: 强全局体积重叠不等同于肿瘤-血管界面的可靠性能；二值分割方法在低专家共识的高复杂度病例中表现退化；建模评分者分歧的方法生成更好的校准概率图，鲁棒性更强。
AI.conclusion: 体积准确性不能充分代理局部手术效用，需要不确定性感知的概率模型来支持术前决策。

title: Belief-Guided Inference Control for Large Language Model Services via Verifiable Observations
summary: In black-box large language model (LLM) services, response reliability is often only partially observable at decision time, while stronger inference pathways incur substantial computational cost, inducing a budgeted sequential decision problem: for each request, the system should decide whether the default low-cost response is sufficiently reliable or whether additional computation should be allocated to improve response quality. In this paper, we propose \textbf{Ver}ifiable \textbf{O}bservations for Risk-aware \textbf{I}nference \textbf{C}ontrol (\textsc{Veroic}), a framework for adaptive inference control in black-box LLM settings, which formulates request-time control as a \textit{partially observable Markov decision process} to capture partial observability and sequential budget coupling. It constructs a lightweight verifiable observation channel from the input-output pair by aggregating heterogeneous quality signals into a belief state over latent response reliability, which is then used by a budget-aware policy to decide whether to return the default output or trigger a higher-cost inference pathway. Experiments on diverse tasks show that \textsc{Veroic} achieves improved quality-cost trade-offs, stronger risk estimation and calibration, and more robust long-horizon inference control than competitive baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出Veroic框架，将黑盒LLM推理控制建模为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程，通过轻量级可验证观测通道聚合质量信号来动态决定是否触发高成本推理，实现质量-成本权衡优化。
AI.motivation: 黑盒LLM服务中，响应可靠性在决策时仅部分可观测，而强推理路径计算成本高，需要解决预算约束下的序贯决策问题：决定默认低成本响应是否足够可靠，或是否应分配额外计算资源提升响应质量。
AI.method: 将请求时控制建模为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），捕捉部分可观测性和序贯预算耦合；构建从输入-输出对聚合异质质量信号的轻量级可验证观测通道，形成关于潜在响应可靠性的置信状态；由预算感知策略决定返回默认输出或触发高成本推理。
AI.result: 在多种任务上，Veroic相比竞争基线实现了更好的质量-成本权衡、更强的风险估计与校准，以及更鲁棒的长期推理控制。
AI.conclusion: Veroic为黑盒LLM服务提供了一种自适应推理控制框架，有效平衡了响应质量与计算成本，并具有良好的风险感知能力。

title: Mapping how LLMs debate societal issues when shadowing human personality traits, sociodemographics and social media behavior
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) can strongly shape social discourse, yet datasets investigating how LLM outputs vary across controlled social and contextual prompting remain sparse. Cognitive Digital Shadows (CDS) is a 190,000-record synthetic corpus supporting analyses of LLM-generated discourse. Each CDS record is generated by one of 19 LLMs, prompted to shadow either a human persona or an AI-assistant role. CDS contains LLM responses on 4 controversial societal topics: vaccines/healthcare, social media disinformation, the gender gap in science, and STEM stereotypes. Persona-conditioned records encode 17 sociodemographic and psychological attributes, providing data linking LLMs' prompts, language, stances and reasoning. Texts are validated for topic anchoring and can support emotional analyses via interpretable NLP (e.g. textual forma mentis networks). CDS is enriched by a pooling platform with user-friendly dashboards, enabling easy, interactive group-level comparisons of emotional and semantic framing across personas, topics and models. The CDS prompting framework supports future audits of LLMs' bias, social sensitivity and alignment.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Cognitive Digital Shadows (CDS)，一个包含19个LLM生成的19万条记录的合成语料库，用于分析LLM在不同社会与上下文提示下的输出差异，涵盖4个有争议的社会话题，并支持情感与语义分析。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏对LLM在受控社会与上下文提示条件下输出差异的系统研究，需要构建一个大规模、结构化的语料库来支持LLM偏见、社会敏感性与对齐性的审计。
AI.method: 使用19个不同的LLM，分别以人类角色或AI助手角色进行提示，生成关于4个争议性社会话题的响应。每条记录编码17个社会人口学与心理学属性，并通过可解释NLP方法（如文本forma mentis网络）进行情感分析，最后通过交互式仪表盘实现群体级比较。
AI.result: 构建了CDS合成语料库，包含19万条记录，覆盖19个LLM、2种角色、4个话题，并验证了话题锚定性，支持情感与语义框架的群体级比较。
AI.conclusion: CDS为未来审计LLM的偏见、社会敏感性与对齐性提供了可扩展的提示框架和数据分析平台。

title: ABC: Any-Subset Autoregression via Non-Markovian Diffusion Bridges in Continuous Time and Space
summary: Generating continuous-time, continuous-space stochastic processes (e.g., videos, weather forecasts) conditioned on partial observations (e.g., first and last frames) is a fundamental challenge. Existing approaches, (e.g., diffusion models), suffer from key limitations: (1) noise-to-data evolution fails to capture structural similarity between states close in physical time and has unstable integration in low-step regimes; (2) random noise injected is insensitive to the physical process's time elapsed, resulting in incorrect dynamics; (3) they overlook conditioning on arbitrary subsets of states (e.g., irregularly sampled timesteps, future observations). We propose ABC: Any-Subset Autoregressive Models via Non-Markovian Diffusion Bridges in Continuous Time and Space. Crucially, we model the process with one continual SDE whose time variable and intermediate states track the real time and process states. This has provable advantages: (1) the starting point for generating future states is the already-close previous state, rather than uninformative noise; (2) random noise injection scales with physical time elapsed, encouraging physically plausible dynamics with similar time-adjacent states. We derive SDE dynamics via changes-of-measure on path space, yielding another advantage: (3) path-dependent conditioning on arbitrary subsets of the state history and/or future. To learn these dynamics, we derive a path- and time-dependent extension of denoising score matching. Our experiments show ABC's superiority to competing methods on multiple domains, including video generation and weather forecasting.

AI.tldr: 提出ABC：一种基于非马尔可夫扩散桥的连续时间-空间任意子集自回归模型，通过单一连续SDE生成受部分观测约束的随机过程，在视频生成和天气预报中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型在生成连续时间-空间随机过程时存在三个关键缺陷：噪声到数据的演化无法捕捉物理时间上相近状态的结构相似性；随机噪声注入对物理过程的时间流逝不敏感；无法处理任意子集（如不规则采样时间步、未来观测）的条件约束。
AI.method: 用一个连续的SDE建模整个随机过程，其中时变变量和中间状态跟踪真实时间和过程状态。通过路径空间上的测度变换导出SDE动力学，实现基于路径的任意子集条件约束；推导了路径和时间相关的去噪分数匹配方法进行学习。
AI.result: 在视频生成和天气预报等多个领域中，ABC方法优于现有的竞争方法。
AI.conclusion: ABC通过非马尔可夫扩散桥在连续时空框架下解决了现有方法的根本性局限，为条件随机过程生成提供了更物理合理、更灵活的建模方式。

title: Fake3DGS: A Benchmark for 3D Manipulation Detection in Neural Rendering
comment: Accepted at ICPR 2026. Code and data: https://github.com/iot-unimore/Fake3DGS
summary: Recent advances in 3D reconstruction and neural rendering,particularly 3D Gaussian Splatting, make it feasible and simple to edit 3D scenes and re-render them as highly realistic images. Therefore, security concerns arise regarding the authenticity of 3D content. Despite this threat, 3D fake detection remains largely unexplored in the literature, and most existing work is limited to 2D space. Therefore, in this paper, we formalize the concept of 3D fake detection and introduce Fake3DGS, a dataset of 3D Gaussian splatting scenes and corresponding rendered views, where fake images are produced by controlled manipulations of geometry, appearance, and spatial layout, while preserving high visual realism. Using this benchmark, we demonstrate that current state-of-the-art 2D detectors struggle to distinguish between original and 3D manipulated images. To bridge this gap, we introduce a 3D-aware detection method that leverages multi-view coherence and features derived from the Gaussian splatting representation. Experimental results demonstrate a substantial improvement in recognizing modified 3D content, underscoring the validity of the new dataset and the necessity for authenticity assessment techniques that extend beyond 2D evidence. Code and data are publicly released for future investigations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出3D伪造检测概念，构建Fake3DGS数据集（基于3D高斯泼溅的伪造场景），发现现有2D检测器无法识别3D篡改，并提出利用多视图一致性的3D感知检测方法，显著提升检测效果。
AI.motivation: 3D重建与神经渲染（尤其是3D高斯泼溅）技术使3D场景编辑变得简单且逼真，引发了3D内容真实性的安全担忧，但现有伪造检测研究大多局限于2D空间，缺乏针对3D伪造的检测方法。
AI.method: 1) 构建Fake3DGS数据集，通过对几何、外观和空间布局进行受控操作生成逼真的伪造3D场景及渲染视图；2) 提出3D感知检测方法，利用多视图一致性特征和高斯泼溅表示中的特征进行真伪判别。
AI.result: 当前最先进的2D检测器难以区分原始图像与3D篡改图像，而提出的3D感知检测方法在识别修改后的3D内容上表现显著优于2D方法。
AI.conclusion: 验证了Fake3DGS数据集的有效性，强调了超越2D证据的真实性评估技术的必要性，并提供公开代码和数据支持后续研究。

title: In-Context Examples Suppress Scientific Knowledge Recall in LLMs
summary: Scientific reasoning rarely stops at what is directly observable; it often requires uncovering hidden structure from data. From estimating reaction constants in chemistry to inferring demand elasticities in economics, this latent structure recovery is what distinguishes scientific reasoning from curve fitting. Large language models (LLMs) can often recall and apply relevant scientific formulas, but we show that this ability is surprisingly easy to suppress. We show that adding in-context examples makes models rely less on pretrained domain knowledge, even when those examples are generated by the very same formula. Rather than reinforcing knowledge-driven derivation, examples shift computation toward empirical pattern fitting. We document this knowledge displacement on 60 latent structure recovery tasks across five scientific domains, 6,000 trials, and four models. This displacement is consistent across domains, but its accuracy consequences depend on how the displaced strategy compares to the one that replaces it: the same shift can lower accuracy, leave it unchanged, or appear to improve it. In all cases, however, the model shifts away from knowledge-driven reasoning. For practitioners deploying LLMs on scientific tasks, the message is cautionary: in-context examples may displace, rather than reinforce, the knowledge they are intended to support.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，在科学推理任务中，给大语言模型添加上下文示例并不会增强其知识驱动的推理能力，反而会使其从依赖领域知识转向依赖经验模式匹配，导致"知识位移"现象。这一发现在60个任务、6000次试验和4个模型上得到验证。
AI.motivation: 科学推理需要从数据中发现隐藏结构（如化学反应常数、经济需求弹性），这不同于简单的曲线拟合。研究者想探究大语言模型在科学推理中是否真的能利用预训练知识，还是会被上下文示例误导而退化为模式匹配。
AI.method: 设计了60个隐藏结构恢复任务，跨越5个科学领域，使用4种LLM模型，进行了6000次试验。通过比较添加或不添加上下文示例时的模型表现，观察模型是否从知识驱动推理转向经验模式拟合。
AI.result: 添加上下文示例会一致性地让模型减少对预训练领域知识的依赖，转向经验模式匹配。这种"知识位移"在不同领域表现一致，但对准确率的影响因情况而异（降低、不变甚至看起来提升），本质都是偏离了知识驱动推理。
AI.conclusion: 对于在科学任务中部署LLM的从业者而言，这是一个警示：上下文示例可能会置换、而非增强它们本应支持的知识。实践中需要警惕in-context learning可能带来的知识位移风险。

title: Language Ideologies in a Multilingual Society: An LLM-based Analysis of Luxembourgish News Comments
summary: Detecting language ideologies is a valuable yet complex task for understanding how identities are constructed through discourse. In Luxembourg's multicultural and multilingual society, language ideologies reflect more than simple preferences: they carry deep cultural and social meanings, shaping identities and social belonging. Following recent developments in applying Natural Language Processing tools to linguistics and social science, this paper explores the potential of large language models to assist in the detection of language ideologies. We manually annotate a corpus of user comments in Luxembourgish with predefined ideological categories and then evaluate the performance of large language models under varying prompt conditions to assess their ability to replicate these human annotations. Since Luxembourgish is a small language and poorly represented in the LLMs' training data, we also investigate whether machine-translating the data to high-resource languages increases performance on the ideology detection task. Our findings suggest that, while LLMs are not yet fully optimized for a multi-class ideological annotation task, they are practical tools to identify language ideological content.

AI.tldr: 本文探討利用大型語言模型（LLMs）檢測盧森堡語中的語言意識形態。研究團隊手動標註使用者評論，並測試LLM在不同提示條件下的表現，同時比較機器翻譯至強勢語言後的效果。結果顯示，LLM雖未達多類別意識形態標註的最佳化，但仍可作為實用工具來辨識語言意識形態內容。
AI.motivation: 語言意識形態能反映身分認同與社會歸屬，但在盧森堡這種多語言、多文化社會中，檢測語言意識形態既具價值又複雜。近期NLP工具應用於語言學與社會科學的發展啟發了本研究，作者希望探索LLM能否協助自動檢測語言意識形態，尤其針對盧森堡語這類低資源語言。
AI.method: 研究團隊手動標註一批盧森堡語使用者評論，預定義意識形態類別；接著在不同提示條件下評估大型語言模型（LLM）再現人類標註的能力；另因盧森堡語在LLM訓練資料中稀缺，也測試將資料機器翻譯至高資源語言後是否能提升檢測表現。
AI.result: LLM尚未完全優化於多類別意識形態標註任務，但仍是辨識語言意識形態內容的實用工具；機器翻譯至高資源語言對檢測表現的影響亦經實驗探討。
AI.conclusion: 大型語言模型雖非完美，但在語言意識形態檢測任務上具有實用價值，尤其為低資源語言的社會語言學研究提供可行方案。

title: Improving Graph Few-shot Learning with Hyperbolic Space and Denoising Diffusion
summary: Graph few-shot learning, which focuses on effectively learning from only a small number of labeled nodes to quickly adapt to new tasks, has garnered significant research attention. Despite recent advances in graph few-shot learning that have demonstrated promising performance, existing methods still suffer from several key limitations. First, during the meta-training phase, these methods typically perform node representation learning in Euclidean space, which often fails to capture the inherently hierarchical structure existing in real-world graph data. Second, during the meta-testing phase, they usually fit an empirical target distribution derived from only a few support samples, even when this distribution significantly deviates from the true underlying distribution. To address these issues, we propose IMPRESS, a novel framework that IMproves graPh few-shot learning with hypeRbolic spacE and denoiSing diffuSion. Specifically, our model learns node representations in a hyperbolic space and enriches the support distribution through denoising diffusion mechanisms. Theoretically, IMPRESS achieves a tighter generalization bound. Empirically, IMPRESS consistently outperforms competitive baselines across multiple benchmark datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出IMPRESS框架，通过双曲空间表示学习与去噪扩散机制，解决图少样本学习中层级结构捕获不足与支持分布偏移问题，理论泛化界更紧，实验表现优于基线。
AI.motivation: 现有图少样本学习方法存在两个关键局限：1) 元训练阶段在欧氏空间学习节点表示，难以捕获真实图数据中固有的层级结构；2) 元测试阶段仅依赖少量支持样本拟合经验目标分布，当该分布与真实分布偏差较大时性能下降。
AI.method: 提出IMPRESS框架：1) 在双曲空间中学习节点表示以更好地建模层级结构；2) 利用去噪扩散机制丰富支持集分布，缓解小样本导致的分布偏移问题。
AI.result: 理论上证明了IMPRESS具有更紧的泛化界；实验上在多个基准数据集上持续优于竞争基线。
AI.conclusion: 双曲空间表示与去噪扩散机制的结合能有效提升图少样本学习的性能，为处理层级图数据和小样本分布偏移问题提供了新思路。

title: ClipTBP: Clip-Pair based Temporal Boundary Prediction with Boundary-Aware Learning for Moment Retrieval
summary: Video moment retrieval is the task of retrieving specific segments of a video corresponding to a given text query. Recent studies have been conducted to improve multimodal alignment performance through visual-linguistic similarity learning at the snippet-level and transformer-based temporal boundary regression. However, existing models do not calculate similarity by considering the relationships between multiple answer segments that match the query. Therefore, existing models are easily influenced by visually similar segments in the surrounding context. Existing models calculate similarity at the snippet-level and ignore the relationships between multiple answer segments corresponding to a single query. Therefore, they struggle to exclude segments irrelevant to the query. To address this issues, we propose ClipTBP, a clip-pair temporal boundary prediction framework based on boundary-aware learning. ClipTBP introduces a clip-level alignment loss for explicitly learning the semantic relationship between answer segments. ClipTBP also predicts accurate temporal boundaries by applying both main boundary loss and auxiliary boundary loss. ClipTBP consistently improves performance when applied to various existing models and demonstrates more robust boundary prediction performance even in ambiguous query scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ClipTBP，一种基于边界感知学习的片段对时间边界预测框架，通过片段级对齐损失学习答案片段间的语义关系，并结合主边界损失和辅助边界损失实现更准确的视频时刻检索。
AI.motivation: 现有模型仅在片段级别计算相似度，忽略了与查询匹配的多个答案片段之间的语义关系，导致易受视觉相似但无关片段的干扰，难以排除无关片段。
AI.method: 提出ClipTBP框架：1）引入片段级对齐损失，显式学习答案片段间的语义关系；2）结合主边界损失和辅助边界损失，预测精确的时间边界。
AI.result: ClipTBP在现有多种模型上一致提升性能，在模糊查询场景下展现出更鲁棒的边界预测能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模答案片段间的关系和双重边界损失，有效解决了现有模型受视觉相似片段干扰的问题，提升了视频时刻检索的准确性。

title: SpatialGrammar: A Domain-Specific Language for LLM-Based 3D Indoor Scene Generation
summary: Automatically generating interactive 3D indoor scenes from natural language is crucial for virtual reality, gaming, and embodied AI. However, existing LLM-based approaches often suffer from spatial errors and collisions, in part because common scene representations-raw coordinates or verbose code-are difficult for models to reason about 3D spatial relationships and physical constraints. We propose SpatialGrammar, a domain-specific language that represents gravity-aligned indoor layouts as BEV grid placements with deterministic compilation to valid 3D geometry, enabling verifiable constraint checking. Building on this representation, we develop (1) SG-Agent, a closed-loop system that uses compiler feedback to iteratively refine scenes and enforce collision constraints, and (2) SG-Mini, a 104M-parameter model trained entirely on compiler-validated synthetic data. Across 159 test scenes spanning five scenarios of different complexity, SG-Agent improves spatial fidelity and physical plausibility over prior methods, while SG-Mini performs competitively against larger LLM-based baselines on single-shot generation scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出SpatialGrammar，一种用于自动生成3D室内场景的领域特定语言，通过BEV网格布局和确定性编译实现可验证的约束检查。基于此开发了SG-Agent（闭环迭代优化系统）和SG-Mini（104M参数模型），在159个测试场景中显著提升了空间准确性和物理合理性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的3D室内场景生成方法常出现空间错误和碰撞问题，因为原始坐标或冗长代码等常见场景表示难以让模型推理3D空间关系和物理约束。
AI.method: 提出SpatialGrammar领域特定语言，将重力对齐的室内布局表示为BEV网格布局，可确定性编译为有效3D几何，支持可验证约束检查。基于此开发SG-Agent（闭环系统，利用编译器反馈迭代优化）和SG-Mini（104M参数模型，完全在编译器验证的合成数据上训练）。
AI.result: 在涵盖五种不同复杂度场景的159个测试场景中，SG-Agent在空间保真度和物理合理性上优于先前方法；SG-Mini在单次生成场景中与更大规模LLM基线表现相当。
AI.conclusion: SpatialGrammar表示方法能有效解决3D室内场景生成中的空间错误和碰撞问题，小模型也能通过编译器验证的合成数据达到竞争性表现。

title: Toward Scalable SDN for LEO Mega-Constellations: A Graph Learning Approach
summary: Terrestrial network limitations drive the integration of non-terrestrial networks (NTNs), notably mega-constellations comprising thousands of low Earth orbit (LEO) satellites. While these satellites act as interconnected network switches via inter-satellite links (ISLs), their massive scale creates severe bottlenecks for network management. To address this, we propose a scalable, hierarchical software-defined networking (SDN) framework. Our architecture leverages graph neural networks (GNNs) to compactly represent the constellation topology, and Koopman theory to linearize nonlinear dynamics. Specifically, a Graph Koopman Autoencoder (GKAE) forecasts spatio-temporal behavior within a linear subspace for each orbital shell. A central SDN controller then aggregates these shell-level predictions for globally coordinated control. Simulations on the Starlink constellation demonstrate that our approach achieves at least a 42.8\% improvement in spatial compression and a 10.81\% improvement in temporal forecasting compared to established baselines, all while utilizing a significantly smaller model footprint.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图神经网络和Koopman理论的层次化SDN框架（GKAE），用于高效管理大规模LEO卫星星座网络。通过图Koopman自编码器对轨道壳进行时空预测，中央控制器实现全局协调。在Starlink仿真中，该方法在空间压缩（提升42.8%）和时间预测（提升10.81%）上均优于基线，且模型更轻量。
AI.motivation: 地面网络受限，需集成非地面网络（NTN）。大规模LEO卫星星座虽通过星间链路实现互联，但其巨大规模给网络管理带来严重瓶颈，现有方法难以高效处理。
AI.method: 提出层次化软件定义网络（SDN）框架。利用图神经网络（GNN）紧凑表示星座拓扑，结合Koopman理论线性化非线性动态。具体设计图Koopman自编码器（GKAE），在每个轨道壳的线性子空间中预测时空行为，中央SDN控制器聚合壳级预测实现全局协调控制。
AI.result: 在Starlink星座仿真中，相比基线方法，空间压缩提升至少42.8%，时间预测提升10.81%，同时模型参数量更小。
AI.conclusion: 所提层次化SDN框架结合GNN与Koopman理论，能有效应对大规模LEO星座网络管理瓶颈，实现高效、轻量的时空预测与全局控制。

title: SECOS: Semantic Capture for Rigorous Classification in Open-World Semi-Supervised Learning
summary: In open-world semi-supervised learning (OWSSL), a model learns from labeled data and unlabeled data containing both known and novel classes. In practical OWSSL applications, models are expected to perform rigorous classification by directly selecting the most semantically relevant label from a candidate set for each sample. Existing OWSSL methods fail to achieve this because novel samples are trained without explicit supervision, and these methods lack mechanisms to extract latent semantic information, resulting in predicted labels that have no semantic correspondence to candidate textual labels. To address this, we introduce SEmantic Capture for Open-world Semi-supervised learning (SECOS), which directly predicts textual labels from the candidate set without post-processing, meeting the requirements of practical OWSSL applications. SECOS leverages external knowledge to extract and align semantic representations across modalities for both known and novel classes, providing explicit supervisory signals for training novel classes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that even when existing OWSSL methods are evaluated under the more lenient post-hoc matching setting, SECOS still surpasses them by up to 5.4\% without such assistance, highlighting its superior effectiveness. Code is available at https://github.com/ganchi-huanggua/OSSL-Classification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SECOS方法，通过外部知识提取和对齐多模态语义表示，实现开放世界半监督学习中的直接语义标签预测，在无需后处理的情况下超越现有方法最高5.4%。
AI.motivation: 现有开放世界半监督学习方法无法直接预测语义相关的文本标签，因为新类样本缺乏显式监督，且缺少提取潜在语义信息的机制，导致预测标签与候选文本标签无语义对应关系，不满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: SECOS利用外部知识提取并对齐已知类和未知类的跨模态语义表示，为训练新类提供显式监督信号，从而直接从候选集中预测文本标签，无需后处理。
AI.result: 在更宽松的后处理匹配设置下，SECOS仍比现有OWSSL方法高出最高5.4%。
AI.conclusion: SECOS通过语义捕获机制有效解决了开放世界半监督学习中的直接语义标签预测问题，显著优于现有方法。

title: Trace-Level Analysis of Information Contamination in Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Reasoning over heterogeneous artifacts (PDFs, spreadsheets, slide decks, etc.) increasingly occurs within structured agent workflows that iteratively extract, transform, and reference external information. In these workflows, uncertainty is not merely an input-quality issue: it can redirect decomposition and routing decisions, reshape intermediate state, and produce qualitatively different execution trajectories. We study this phenomenon by treating uncertainty as a controlled variable: we inject structured perturbations into artifact-derived representations, execute fixed workflows under comprehensive logging, and quantify contamination via trace divergence in plans, tool invocations, and intermediate state. Across 614 paired runs on 32 GAIA tasks with three different language models, we find a decoupling: workflows may diverge substantially yet recover correct answers, or remain structurally similar while producing incorrect outputs. We characterize three manifestation types: silent semantic corruption, behavioral detours with recovery, and combined structural disruption and their control-flow signatures (rerouting, extended execution, early termination). We measure operational costs and characterize why commonly used verification guardrails fail to intercept contamination. We contribute (i) a formal taxonomy of contamination manifestations in structured workflows, (ii) a trace-based measurement framework for detecting and localizing contamination across agent interactions, and (iii) empirical evidence with implications for targeted verification, defensive design, and cost control.

AI.tldr: 本文通过在结构化Agent工作流中注入可控扰动，系统研究了不确定性如何导致执行轨迹污染。在614次GAIA任务运行中发现：工作流可能显著偏离但仍获得正确答案，或结构相似却输出错误结果。提出了三种污染表现类型（语义静默腐蚀、行为绕道恢复、结构破坏）及形式化分类体系与追踪测量框架。
AI.motivation: 现有工作将不确定性视为输入质量问题，但忽略了在结构化Agent工作流中，不确定性会改变分解路由决策、重塑中间状态、产生不同的执行轨迹。作者旨在将不确定性作为可控变量，系统研究其传播与影响机制。
AI.method: 在32个GAIA任务上，使用3种语言模型进行614次成对实验。将结构化扰动注入工件派生表征，在固定工作流下执行并全面日志记录，通过计划、工具调用、中间状态的轨迹散度量化污染程度。
AI.result: 发现解耦现象：工作流显著偏离时仍可能正确，结构相似时却错误。识别出三种污染类型：语义静默腐蚀（无声错误）、行为绕道恢复（绕路后修复）、结构破坏（完全失控）。测量了操作成本，发现常见验证护栏无法拦截污染。
AI.conclusion: 贡献了结构化工作流中污染表现的形式化分类体系、基于轨迹的污染检测与定位测量框架，以及为目标验证、防御设计、成本控制提供的实证依据。

title: Instruction-Guided Poetry Generation in Arabic and Its Dialects
summary: Poetry has long been a central art form for Arabic speakers, serving as a powerful medium of expression and cultural identity. While modern Arabic speakers continue to value poetry, existing research on Arabic poetry within Large Language Models (LLMs) has primarily focused on analysis tasks such as interpretation or metadata prediction, e.g., rhyme schemes and titles. In contrast, our work addresses the practical aspect of poetry creation in Arabic by introducing controllable generation capabilities to assist users in writing poetry. Specifically, we present a large-scale, carefully curated instruction-based dataset in Modern Standard Arabic (MSA) and various Arabic dialects. This dataset enables tasks such as writing, revising, and continuing poems based on predefined criteria, including style and rhyme, as well as performing poetry analysis. Our experiments show that fine-tuning LLMs on this dataset yields models that can effectively generate poetry that is aligned with user requirements, based on both automated metrics and human evaluation with native Arabic speakers. The data and the code are available at https://github.com/mbzuai-nlp/instructpoet-ar

AI.tldr: 本文构建了大规模阿拉伯语诗歌指令数据集，通过微调大语言模型，实现了符合用户要求的可控诗歌生成（包括现代标准阿拉伯语和方言），实验证明该方法在自动评估和人工评估中均有效。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注阿拉伯诗歌的分析任务（如韵律预测、标题预测等），缺乏面向实际创作需求的可控生成能力，本研究旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 构建大规模、精心策划的基于指令的阿拉伯语诗歌数据集（涵盖现代标准阿拉伯语和多种方言），包含写作、修改、续写等任务，并基于风格、韵律等预设标准进行控制。通过微调LLM实现可控诗歌生成。
AI.result: 微调后的模型能够有效生成符合用户需求的诗歌，在自动评估指标和以阿拉伯语母语者进行的人工评估中均表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 指令微调是赋予大语言模型可控阿拉伯诗歌生成能力的有效途径，该数据集和模型有望辅助用户进行诗歌创作。

title: Low Rank Adaptation for Adversarial Perturbation
summary:
Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), which leverages the insight that model updates typically reside in a low-dimensional space, has significantly improved the training efficiency of Large Language Models (LLMs) by updating neural network layers using low-rank matrices. Since the generation of adversarial examples is an optimization process analogous to model training, this naturally raises the question: Do adversarial perturbations exhibit a similar low-rank structure?
  In this paper, we provide both theoretical analysis and extensive empirical investigation across various attack methods, model architectures, and datasets to show that adversarial perturbations indeed possess an inherently low-rank structure. This insight opens up new opportunities for improving both adversarial attacks and defenses. We mainly focus on leveraging this low-rank property to improve the efficiency and effectiveness of black-box adversarial attacks, which often suffer from excessive query requirements. Our method follows a two-step approach. First, we use a reference model and auxiliary data to guide the projection of gradients into a low-dimensional subspace. Next, we confine the perturbation search in black-box attacks to this low-rank subspace, significantly improving the efficiency and effectiveness of the adversarial attacks.
  We evaluated our approach across a range of attack methods, benchmark models, datasets, and threat models. The results demonstrate substantial and consistent improvements in the performance of our low-rank adversarial attacks compared to conventional methods.

AI.tldr: 本文发现对抗扰动具有与LoRA类似的低秩结构，并通过理论分析和实验验证了这一特性。基于此，作者提出了一种黑盒对抗攻击方法：先用参考模型和辅助数据将梯度投影到低维子空间，再在此子空间中进行扰动搜索，显著提升了攻击效率和效果。
AI.motivation: LoRA利用低秩结构提高了大模型训练效率，而对抗样本生成与模型训练类似，那么对抗扰动是否也存在低秩结构？作者希望借此改进黑盒对抗攻击的效率。
AI.method: 两步法：(1) 使用参考模型和辅助数据将梯度投影到低维子空间；(2) 在黑盒攻击中将扰动搜索限制在该低秩子空间内，从而减少查询次数并提高攻击效果。
AI.result: 在多种攻击方法、基准模型、数据集和威胁模型下，该方法相比传统方法在攻击性能和效率上都有显著且一致的提升。
AI.conclusion: 对抗扰动确实具有固有的低秩结构，利用这一特性可以有效提升黑盒对抗攻击的效率与有效性。

title: Decoding Scientific Experimental Images: The SPUR Benchmark for Perception, Understanding, and Reasoning
summary: We introduce SPUR, a comprehensive benchmark for scientific experimental image perception, understanding, and reasoning, comprising 4,264 question-answering (QA) pairs derived from 1,084 expert-curated images. SPUR features three key innovations: (1) Panel-Level Fine-Grained Perception: evaluating the visual perception of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) across three dimensions (numerical, morphological, and information localization) on six fine-grained panel types; (2) Cross-Panel Relation Understanding: utilizing complex images with an average of 14.3 panels per sample to evaluate MLLMs' ability to decipher intricate cross-panel relations; (3) Expert-Level Reasoning: assessment of qualitative and quantitative reasoning across five experimental paradigms to determine if models can infer conclusions from evidence as human experts do. Comprehensive evaluation of 20 MLLMs and four multimodal Chain-of-Thought (MCoT) methods reveals that current models fall significantly short of the expert-level requirements for scientific image interpretation, underscoring a critical bottleneck in AI for Science (AI4S) research.

AI.tldr: SPUR是一个科学实验图像理解基准，包含4,264个QA对，从三个维度（细粒度感知、跨面板关系理解、专家级推理）评估多模态大模型，发现当前模型远未达到科学图像解释的专家水平。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs在科学图像理解上缺乏系统性评估基准，尤其是在面板级细粒度感知、跨面板关系推理和专家级推理方面存在空白，这成为AI for Science研究的瓶颈。
AI.method: 构建包含1,084张专家策展图像、4,264个QA对的SPUR基准，设计三种评估维度：(1)面板级细粒度感知（数值、形态、信息定位）；(2)跨面板关系理解（平均每样本14.3个面板）；(3)专家级推理（五种实验范式的定性与定量推理）。对20个MLLMs和4种多模态思维链方法进行全面评估。
AI.result: 当前20个MLLMs和4种MCoT方法在SPUR基准上表现显著不足，远未达到科学图像解释的专家水平，揭示了AI4S研究的关键瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 现有多模态大模型在科学实验图像的细粒度感知、跨面板关系理解和专家级推理方面存在严重不足，亟需新的方法突破以推动AI for Science发展。

title: Math Education Digital Shadows for facilitating learning with LLMs: Math performance, anxiety and confidence in simulated students and AIs
summary: To enhance LLMs' impact on math education, we need data on their mathematical prowess and biases across prompts. To fill this gap, we introduce MEDS (Math Education Digital Shadows) as a dataset mapping how large language models reason about and report mathematics across human- and AI-like conditions. MEDS involves 28,000 personas from 14 LLMs (from families like Mistral, Qwen, DeepSeek, Granite, Phi and Grok) shadowing either humans or AI assistants. Each record/shadow includes a set of prompts along with psychological/sociodemographic persona metadata and four types of math tasks: (i) open math interview, (ii) three psychometric tests about math perceptions with explanations, (iii) cognitive networks capturing math attitudes, and (iv) 18 high-school math test questions together with their reasoning and confidence scores. MEDS differs from traditional score-only math benchmarks because it integrates concepts of self-efficacy, math anxiety, and cognitive network science besides math proficiency scores. Data validation shows that the sampled LLMs exhibit schema integrity and consistent personas, together with family-specific peculiarities like human-like negative math attitudes, logical fallacies, and math overconfidence. MEDS will benefit learning analytics experts, cognitive scientists, and developers of safer AI tutors in mathematics.

AI.tldr: MEDS是一个包含28,000条记录的数据集，记录了14种大语言模型在人类和AI助手条件下的数学推理和报告行为，涵盖开放式数学访谈、心理测量测试、认知网络和高中数学题四种任务，并集成了自我效能感、数学焦虑等心理社会维度，超越了传统仅关注分数的数学基准。
AI.motivation: 现有数学基准仅关注分数，缺乏对LLM在数学教育中自我效能感、数学焦虑、认知网络等心理社会维度的评估，无法全面了解LLM的数学能力和偏见。
AI.method: 收集14种LLM（Mistral、Qwen、DeepSeek、Granite、Phi和Grok等系列）在人类和AI助手条件下的28,000个"阴影"记录，每个记录包含心理/社会人口学元数据及四种数学任务：开放式数学访谈、三种数学感知心理测试（含解释）、认知网络捕捉数学态度、18道高中数学题及答案推理和置信度分数。
AI.result: 数据验证显示LLM表现出模式完整性和一致的人物角色，同时存在家族特定的特性，如人类般的消极数学态度、逻辑谬误和数学过度自信。
AI.conclusion: MEDS数据集将惠及学习分析专家、认知科学家以及更安全的数学AI辅导工具开发者。

title: Multi-Level Narrative Evaluation Outperforms Lexical Features for Mental Health
summary: How people narrate their experiences offers a window into how the mind organizes them. Computational approaches to therapeutic writing have evolved from lexical counting to neural methods, yet remain fragmented: dictionary tools miss discourse structure, while embeddings conflate local coherence with global organization. No existing framework maps these techniques onto the hierarchical processes through which narratives are constructed. Here we introduce a three-level framework - micro-level lexical features, meso-level semantic embeddings, and macro-level LLM narrative evaluation - and show, across 830 Chinese therapeutic texts spanning depression, anxiety, and trauma, that macro-level evaluation substantially outperforms lexical and embedding features for mental health prediction. This challenges the field's emphasis on word-counting: formal structural features (Labov's story grammar, RST coherence, propositional composition) demonstrate that narrative organization per se carries predictive signal, while clinically-grounded narrative dimensions capture how psychological states are expressed through discourse. Semantic embeddings add minimal independent value but yield incremental gains in multi-level classification. By grounding computational levels in discourse processing theory, this framework identifies macro-structural organization as the primary locus of clinical signal and generates testable hypotheses for intervention design and longitudinal research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出三层次分析框架（微观词汇、中观语义嵌入、宏观LLM叙事评估），在830篇中文治疗文本中证明宏观层级在心理健康预测上显著优于传统词汇与嵌入方法，挑战了依赖词频统计的既有范式。
AI.motivation: 现有计算方法（词典法、神经法）碎片化，缺乏将计算技术与叙事构建的层级过程相映射的统一框架，无法有效捕捉临床信号。
AI.method: 构建三层次分析框架：1) 微观：词汇特征；2) 中观：语义嵌入；3) 宏观：LLM叙事评估（结合Labov故事语法、RST连贯性、命题构成及临床叙事维度）。在830篇抑郁、焦虑、创伤中文治疗文本上验证。
AI.result: 宏观LLM叙事评估在心理健康预测上大幅优于微观词汇与中观嵌入特征；语义嵌入独立贡献有限，但多层级分类中有增量提升；叙事结构本身携带预测信号。
AI.conclusion: 宏观叙事组织是临床信号的主要载体，应成为计算叙事分析的核心，为干预设计和纵向研究提供可检验假设。

title: FMCL: Class-Aware Client Clustering with Foundation Model Representations for Heterogeneous Federated Learning
summary: Federated Learning (FL) enables collaborative model training across distributed clients without sharing raw data, yet its performance deteriorates under statistical heterogeneity. Clustered Federated Learning addresses this challenge by grouping similar clients and training separate models per cluster. However, existing clustering strategies often rely on raw data statistics, model parameters, or heuristic similarity measures that fail to capture class-level semantic structure across heterogeneous domains and frequently require iterative coordination. We propose FMCL, a one-shot, class-aware client clustering framework that leverages foundation model representations to construct semantic client signatures. Using a frozen foundation model, FMCL computes class-level embedding prototypes for each client and measures similarity via cosine distance between their class-aware representations. Clustering is performed once prior to training, introducing no additional communication during federated optimization and remaining agnostic to the downstream model architecture. Extensive experiments across heterogeneous benchmarks demonstrate that FMCL improves federated performance and yields more stable clustering behavior compared to existing clustering-based methods under non-identically distributed data partitioning.

AI.tldr: FMCL提出一种基于冻结基础模型的一轮客户端聚类方法，通过语义类级嵌入原型进行聚类，在联邦学习训练前完成聚类，不增加通信开销，提升了异质性场景下的性能与聚类稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有聚类联邦学习方法依赖原始数据统计、模型参数或启发式相似度度量，无法捕获异构域间的类级语义结构，且常需要迭代协调，通信开销大。
AI.method: 利用冻结的基础模型为每个客户端计算类级嵌入原型，通过余弦距离衡量客户端间的类感知相似度，在联邦训练前执行一次性聚类，聚类过程与下游模型架构无关。
AI.result: 在多种异质性基准测试上，FMCL提升了联邦学习性能，并相比现有聚类方法在非独立同分布数据分区下展现出更稳定的聚类行为。
AI.conclusion: FMCL是一种高效、架构无关的一次性客户端聚类框架，能有效应对统计异质性，提升联邦学习的鲁棒性和性能。

title: Robust Lightweight Crack Classification for Real-Time UAV Bridge Inspection
summary: With the widespread application of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) in bridge structural health monitoring, deep learning-based automatic crack detection has become a major research focus. However, practical UAV inspections still face four key challenges: weak crack features, degraded imaging conditions, severe class imbalance, and limited computational resources for practical UAV inspection workflows. To address these issues, this paper proposes a unified lightweight convolutional neural network framework composed of four synergistic components: a lightweight backbone network, a Convolutional Block Attention Module (CBAM) for channel and spatial enhancement, a directed robust augmentation strategy based on inspection-scene priors, and Focal Loss for hard-sample learning under class imbalance. Experiments on the SDNET2018 bridge deck dataset show that the proposed method achieves an inference speed of 825 FPS with only 11.21M parameters and 1.82G FLOPs.
