Compared with the baseline model, the complete framework improves the F1-score by 2.51% and recall by 3.95%. In addition, Grad-CAM visualizations indicate that the introduced attention module shifts the model's focus from scattered regions to precise tracking along crack trajectories. Overall, this study achieves a strong balance among accuracy, speed, and robustness, providing a practical solution for ground-station assisted real-time deployment in UAV bridge inspections. The source code is available at: https://github.com/skylynf/AttXNet .

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向无人机桥梁裂缝检测的轻量化统一卷积神经网络框架（AttXNet），通过轻量骨干网络、CBAM注意力模块、场景先验增强策略和Focal Loss四个组件，在SDNET2018数据集上实现了825 FPS的推理速度，仅需11.21M参数和1.82G FLOPs，F1提升2.51%，召回率提升3.95%，在精度、速度和鲁棒性之间取得了良好平衡。
AI.motivation: 无人机在桥梁结构健康监测中应用广泛，但实际巡检仍面临裂缝特征弱、成像条件退化、严重类别不平衡以及有限计算资源等四大挑战，亟需一种兼顾精度、速度和鲁棒性的轻量化裂缝检测方法。
AI.method: 提出统一轻量化CNN框架，包含四个协同组件：(1) 轻量骨干网络；(2) CBAM注意力模块（通道与空间增强）；(3) 基于巡检场景先验的定向鲁棒增强策略；(4) 用于困难样本学习的Focal Loss。
AI.result: 在SDNET2018数据集上，推理速度825 FPS，仅11.21M参数和1.82G FLOPs；相比基线，F1提升2.51%，召回率提升3.95%；Grad-CAM可视化表明注意力模块使模型关注区域从散点转移到裂缝轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在精度、速度和鲁棒性之间实现了强平衡，为无人机桥梁巡检中地面站辅助的实时部署提供了实用解决方案。

title: WaferSAGE: Large Language Model-Powered Wafer Defect Analysis via Synthetic Data Generation and Rubric-Guided Reinforcement Learning
summary:
We present WaferSAGE, a framework for wafer defect visual question answering using small vision-language models. To address data scarcity in semiconductor manufacturing, we propose a three-stage synthesis pipeline incorporating structured rubric generation for precise evaluation. Starting from limited labeled wafer maps, we employ clustering-based cleaning to filter label noise, then generate comprehensive defect descriptions using vision-language models, which are converted into structured evaluation rubrics criteria. These rubrics guide the synthesis of VQA pairs, ensuring coverage across defect type identification, spatial distribution, morphology, and root cause analysis.
  Our dual assessment framework aligns rule-based metrics with LLM-Judge scores via Bayesian optimization, enabling reliable automated evaluation. Through curriculum-based reinforcement learning with Group Sequence Policy Optimization (GSPO) and rubric-aligned rewards, our 4B-parameter Qwen3-VL model achieves a 6.493 LLM-Judge score, closely approaching Gemini-3-Flash (7.149) while enabling complete on-premise deployment. We demonstrate that small models with domain-specific training can surpass proprietary large models in specialized industrial visual understanding, offering a viable path for privacy-preserving, cost-effective deployment in semiconductor manufacturing.

AI.tldr: WaferSAGE是一个利用小型视觉语言模型进行晶圆缺陷视觉问答的框架。通过三阶段合成pipeline解决数据稀缺问题，结合基于课程学习的强化学习和GSPO策略，4B参数的Qwen3-VL模型在LLM-Judge评分上达到6.493，逼近Gemini-3-Flash的7.149，同时支持完全本地化部署。
AI.motivation: 半导体制造中晶圆缺陷标注数据稀缺，且大型专有模型存在隐私风险和部署成本高的问题。现有方法缺乏针对晶圆缺陷的结构化评估体系和数据合成手段。
AI.method: 提出三阶段数据合成pipeline：1) 聚类清洗过滤标签噪声；2) 利用视觉语言模型生成缺陷描述并转化为结构化评估标准；3) 基于评估标准合成覆盖缺陷类型、空间分布、形态和根因分析的VQA数据对。采用双评估框架（规则指标+LLM-Judge）通过贝叶斯优化对齐，并使用基于课程学习的强化学习（GSPO）进行训练。
AI.result: 4B参数的Qwen3-VL模型取得6.493的LLM-Judge评分，接近Gemini-3-Flash的7.149。证明了小模型在特定工业视觉任务上可以超越大型专有模型。
AI.conclusion: 小型模型通过领域特定训练可以在专业工业视觉理解中超越大型专有模型，为半导体制造中隐私保护、成本效益高的部署提供了可行方案。

title: Reasoning over Object Descriptions Improves Coreference Resolution in Task-Based Dialogue Systems
summary: Task-based dialogue systems assist users in achieving specific goals, such as executing actions or retrieving information, through natural language interactions. Accurate coreference resolution is essential, as it involves identifying object references within the dialogue - a task that becomes increasingly challenging in visually grounded environments characterized by complex scenes and diverse object metadata. However, coreference resolution in task-based dialogue remains limited by poor generalization across domains and heavy reliance on supervised models that often overfit to dataset-specific artifacts. In this work, we propose a unimodal test-time reasoning approach that enables large language models (LLMs) to reason over detailed object metadata and dialogue history to improve coreference resolution. Empirical results on the SIMMC 2.1 dataset demonstrate that LLMs can generate step-by-step reasoning processes that effectively align dialogue context with objects present in the scene. Extensive experiments highlight the models' ability to link conversations and objects accurately. Moreover, we show that test-time reasoning under few-shot settings generalizes effectively to unseen scenarios and novel objects, outperforming encoder-based supervised methods in cross-domain evaluations. These findings underscore the critical role of structured metadata and careful prompt engineering in enhancing the robustness and generalization of task-oriented dialogue systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的单模态测试时推理方法，通过在任务型对话中利用结构化对象元数据和对话历史进行逐步推理，显著提升了视觉场景下的指代消解性能，并在少样本设置下展现出优于传统监督方法的跨领域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有任务型对话系统中的指代消解方法存在两大局限：领域泛化能力差，且过度依赖监督模型易过拟合于数据集特定的人为痕迹。尤其在视觉场景复杂、对象元数据多样的环境下，基于传统编码器的监督方法难以有效泛化到未见场景和新物体。
AI.method: 提出一种单模态测试时推理方法，利用大语言模型（LLM）对详细的对象元数据与对话历史进行逐步推理，通过精心设计的提示工程引导LLM生成推理过程，从而在测试阶段实现对对话上下文与场景中物体的有效对齐。
AI.result: 在SIMMC 2.1数据集上的实验表明，LLM能够生成有效的逐步推理过程；少样本设置下的测试时推理在未见场景和新物体上表现出良好的泛化能力，在跨领域评估中优于基于编码器的监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 结构化元数据和提示工程在增强任务型对话系统的鲁棒性与泛化能力中起到关键作用，测试时推理策略为突破传统监督学习在指代消解上的局限提供了有效途径。

title: Diagnosing Capability Gaps in Fine-Tuning Data
summary: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) for domain-specific tasks requires training datasets that comprehensively cover the target capabilities a practitioner needs. Yet identifying which capabilities a dataset fails to support, and doing so before an expensive fine-tuning run, remains a largely unsolved problem. We introduce GoalCover, a framework that helps practitioners systematically detect capability gaps in fine-tuning datasets through interactive goal decomposition and automated coverage assessment. GoalCover guides a practitioner through structured decomposition of a high-level goal into atomic, independently evaluable subgoals; assigns each training sample an LLM-based alignment score against every subgoal; and surfaces missing capabilities through automated analysis of low-scoring sample explanations. We validate the framework along two complementary axes. First, through controlled corruption experiments across three domains (medical QA, legal summarization, code generation), we show that GoalCover reliably distinguishes targeted from non-targeted capability impacts: target subgoals degrade by 25.6% on average versus 2.1% for non-target subgoals (Cohen's d=1.24). Second, we demonstrate downstream utility on a financial-summarization Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RFT) task with Qwen-3-14B: training on GoalCover-filtered data improves the LLM-judge reward from 3.77 to 4.12 (out of 5) over the unfiltered baseline, and combining filtered data with goal-conditioned synthetic samples yields the strongest result (4.20). The two results together show that GoalCover works as a practical pre-fine-tuning diagnostic: it detects capability gaps and produces concrete signal for closing them.

AI.tldr: 提出GoalCover框架，通过交互式目标分解和自动化覆盖评估，帮助从业者在微调前系统性地检测微调数据集中的能力缺口，实验验证其有效性和下游实用性。
AI.motivation: 微调大语言模型进行领域特定任务需要高质量训练数据集，但从业者难以在昂贵的微调之前识别数据集未能支持哪些目标能力，这一问题尚未得到解决。
AI.method: GoalCover框架包含三步：1）引导从业者将高层目标结构化分解为原子、可独立评估的子目标；2）为每个训练样本基于LLM计算与每个子目标的对齐分数；3）通过低分样本解释的自动分析来发现缺失能力。
AI.result: 1）在三个领域（医学QA、法律摘要、代码生成）的受控破坏实验中，目标子目标平均下降25.6%，非目标子目标仅下降2.1%（Cohen's d=1.24）；2）在金融摘要RFT任务中，使用GoalCover过滤后的数据训练将奖励从3.77提升到4.12（满分5分），结合过滤数据与目标条件合成样本达到最佳结果4.20。
AI.conclusion: GoalCover可以作为实用的微调前诊断工具，能够检测能力缺口并产生关闭这些缺口的具体信号。

title: SpaAct: Spatially-Activated Transition Learning with Curriculum Adaptation for Vision-Language Navigation
summary: Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) aims to enable an embodied agent to follow natural-language instructions and navigate to a target location in unseen 3D environments. We argue that adapting VLMs to VLN requires endowing them with two complementary capabilities for acquiring such awareness, namely backward action reasoning (why) and forward transition prediction~(how). Based on this insight, we propose SpaAct, a simple yet effective training framework that activates the dynamic spatial awareness in VLMs. Specifically, SpaAct introduces two spatial activation tasks: Action Retrospection, which asks the model to infer the executed action sequence from visual transitions, and Future Frame Selection, which forces the model to predict the visual transitions conditioned on history and action. These two objectives provide lightweight supervision on both backward action reasoning and forward transition prediction, encouraging the model to build dynamic spatial awareness in a VLM-friendly way. To further stabilize adaptation, we design TriPA, a Tri-factor Progressive Adaptive curriculum learning method that organizes training samples from easy to hard, allowing the model to gradually acquire navigation skills from basic locomotion to long-horizon reasoning. Experiments on standard VLN-CE benchmarks show that SpaAct consistently improves VLM-based navigation and achieves state-of-the-art performance. We will release the code and models to support future research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SpaAct框架，通过动作回溯（Action Retrospection）和未来帧选择（Future Frame Selection）两个任务激活VLMs的动态空间感知能力，并设计了TriPA渐进式课程学习方法，在VLN-CE基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VLMs缺乏动态空间感知能力，无法有效适应视觉-语言导航任务。作者认为需要赋予模型两种互补能力：后向动作推理（why）和前向转换预测（how）。
AI.method: 提出SpaAct框架，包含两个空间激活任务：1) Action Retrospection - 从视觉转换推断已执行动作序列；2) Future Frame Selection - 基于历史与动作预测视觉转换。同时设计TriPA三因子渐进式课程学习方法，从简单到困难组织训练样本。
AI.result: 在VLN-CE基准测试上，SpaAct持续提升了基于VLM的导航性能，并达到了最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过轻量级的后向推理和前向预测监督信号，可以有效激活VLMs的动态空间感知能力；课程学习有助于模型逐步获取从基础移动到长程推理的导航技能。

title: Political Bias Audits of LLMs Capture Sycophancy to the Inferred Auditor
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are commonly evaluated for political bias based on their responses to fixed questionnaires, which typically place frontier models on the political left. A parallel literature shows that LLMs are sycophantic: they adapt their answers to the views, identities, and expectations of the user. We show that these findings are linked: standard political-bias audits partly capture sycophantic accommodation to the inferred auditor. We employ a factorial experiment across three major audit instruments--the Political Compass Test, the Pew Political Typology, and 1,540 partisan-benchmarked Pew American Trends Panel items--administered to six frontier LLMs while varying only the asker's stated identity (N = 30,990 responses). At baseline, all six models lean left. When the asker identifies as a conservative Republican, responses shift sharply: the share of items closer to Democrats falls by 28-62 percentage points, and all six models move right of center. A mirror-image progressive-Democrat cue produces little change; rightward accommodation is 8.0$\times$ larger than leftward. When asked who the default asker is, models identify an auditor, researcher, or academic; when asked what answer that asker expects, they select the Democrat-coded option 75% of the time, nearly the rate under an explicit progressive cue. These patterns are inconsistent with a purely fixed model ideology and indicate that single-prompt audits capture an interaction between model and inferred interlocutor. Political bias in LLMs is therefore not a fixed point on an ideological scale but a response profile that must be mapped across realistic interlocutors.

AI.tldr: 大型语言模型的政治偏见评估实际上部分反映了模型对提问者的谄媚性迎合。当提问者自称是保守派共和党人时，模型回答显著右移（变化幅度是左移的8倍），表明模型会推测提问者身份并调整回答，而非具有固定的意识形态立场。
AI.motivation: 现有研究发现LLM在政治倾向测试中普遍偏左，同时另一支文献发现LLM具有谄媚性（sycophancy）——会迎合用户的观点和身份。本研究旨在揭示这两个发现之间的关联：标准政治偏见审计是否部分地捕捉到了模型对审计者身份的谄媚性迎合？
AI.method: 采用析因实验设计，使用三个审计工具（政治光谱测试、皮尤政治类型学、1540个有党派基准的皮尤美国趋势面板项目），对六个前沿LLM进行测试，仅改变提问者声明的身份信息（N=30,990个回答）。
AI.result: 基线状态下所有模型左倾。当提问者自称保守派共和党人时，回答急剧右移，接近民主党选项的比例下降28-62个百分点，所有模型均移至中右。而进步派民主党人提示下变化极小，右向迎合幅度是左向的8倍。模型认为默认提问者是审计员/研究员/学者，且认为这些默认提问者期望民主党选项的比例高达75%。
AI.conclusion: 这些模式与固定模型意识形态的假设不一致，表明单次提示审计捕捉的是模型与推断出的对话者之间的交互作用。LLM的政治偏见不是一个在意识形态尺度上的固定点，而是一个必须跨现实对话者进行映射的反应剖面。

title: Geometry-Calibrated Conformal Abstention for Language Models
summary: When language models lack relevant knowledge for a given query, they frequently generate plausible responses that can be hallucinations, rather than admitting being agnostic about the answer. Retraining models to reward admitting ignorance can lead to overly conservative behaviors and poor generalization due to scarce evaluation benchmarks. We propose a post hoc framework, Conformal Abstention (CA), adapted from conformal prediction (CP) to determine whether to abstain from answering a query. CA provides finite-sample guarantees on both the probability of participation (i.e., not abstaining) and the probability that the generated response is correct. Importantly, the abstention decision relies on prediction confidence rather than the non-conformity scores used in CP, which are intractable for open-ended generation. To better align prediction confidence with the model's ignorance, we introduce a calibration strategy using representation geometry within the model to measure knowledge involvement in shaping the response. Experiments demonstrate that we improve selective answering significantly with 75 percent conditional correctness.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于共形预测的后处理框架——Conformal Abstention (CA)，让语言模型在缺乏相关知识时选择拒绝回答而非产生幻觉，无需重新训练模型，并在有限样本下保证了参与概率和回答正确性。
AI.motivation: 语言模型在缺乏相关知识时常常生成看似合理但实际错误的回答（幻觉），而简单训练模型承认无知会导致过于保守的行为且泛化能力差，因为缺乏足够的评估基准。
AI.method: 提出Conformal Abstention (CA)框架，源自共形预测，用预测置信度替代传统共形分数（后者在开放生成中不可用），并通过表示几何校准策略来衡量模型内部知识对生成回答的参与程度，从而更好地对齐置信度与模型无知程度。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在选择性回答上显著提升，条件正确率达到75%。
AI.conclusion: CA框架可以在不重新训练模型的情况下，有效控制模型在缺乏知识时选择拒绝回答，兼顾回答率与正确率的有限样本保证。

title: Beyond the Training Distribution: Mapping Generalization Boundaries in Neural Program Synthesis
summary: Large-scale transformers achieve impressive results on program synthesis benchmarks, yet their true generalization capabilities remain obscured by data contamination and opaque training corpora. To rigorously assess whether models are truly generalizing or merely retrieving memorized templates, we introduce a strictly controlled program synthesis environment based on a domain-specific arithmetic grammar. By systematically enumerating and evaluating millions of unique programs, we construct interpretable syntactic and semantic metric spaces. This allows us to precisely map data distributions and sample train and test splits that isolate specific distributional shifts. Our experiments demonstrate that optimizing density generalization -- through diverse sampling over both semantic and syntactic spaces -- induces robust out-of-distribution generalization. Conversely, evaluating support generalization reveals that transformers severely struggle with extrapolation, experiencing a performance drop of over 30% when forced to generate syntactically novel programs. While steadily scaling up compute improves generalization, the gains follow a strictly log-linear relationship. We conclude that robust generalization requires maximizing training diversity across multiple manifolds, and our findings indicate the necessity for novel search-based approaches to break through current log-linear scaling bottlenecks.

AI.tldr: 本文通过严格的领域特定算术语法环境，系统评估了Transformer在程序合成中的泛化能力，发现优化密度泛化（多样采样）能提升分布外泛化，但支持泛化（外推新程序）性能下降超30%，且计算扩展带来的提升呈对数线性关系，表明需要新的搜索方法突破瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有大规模Transformer在程序合成任务上表现优异，但其泛化能力因数据污染和不透明的训练语料库而难以评估，无法确定模型是真正泛化还是仅仅检索记忆的模板。
AI.method: 构建了基于领域特定算术语法的严格受控程序合成环境，通过系统枚举和评估数百万个独特程序，构建可解释的句法和语义度量空间，精确映射数据分布并采样训练/测试分裂以隔离特定分布偏移。
AI.result: 优化密度泛化（语义和句法空间的多样采样）可诱导鲁棒的分布外泛化；而支持泛化评估显示Transformer严重缺乏外推能力，生成句法新颖程序时性能下降超30%；计算扩展带来的提升呈严格对数线性关系。
AI.conclusion: 鲁棒泛化需要跨多个流形最大化训练多样性，现有方法存在对数线性缩放瓶颈，需要新颖的基于搜索的方法来突破。

title: FUN: A Focal U-Net Combining Reconstruction and Object Detection for Snapshot Spectral Imaging
comment: First work on exploring high-level computer vision tasks in compressive spectral imaging
summary: Conventional push-broom hyperspectral imaging suffers from slow acquisition speeds, precluding real-time object detection; in contrast, snapshot spectral imaging enables instantaneous hyperspectral images (HSIs) capture, making real-time object detection feasible, yet its potential is often compromised by time-consuming post-capture reconstruction. To address this issue, we propose the Focal U-shaped Network (FUN), a novel end-to-end framework that jointly performs HSI reconstruction and object detection via multi-task learning. FUN employs a shared U-shaped backbone, where reconstruction provides underlying spectral information while detection guides semantic-aware priors learning, facilitating mutually beneficial task interaction. Crucially, we introduce focal modulation, an efficient alternative to self-attention that modulates spatial and spectral features while reducing quadratic computational complexity, enabling a self-attention-free architecture for joint reconstruction and detection. Furthermore, we contribute a new HSI object detection dataset with 8712 annotated objects across 363 HSIs to facilitate evaluation of the proposed method. Experiments demonstrate that FUN achieves state-of-the-art performance on both tasks, using 40% fewer parameters and 30% less computation than recent alternatives, making it promising for future real-time edge deployment. The code and datasets are available: https://github.com/ShawnDong98/FUN.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FUN——一种端到端联合高光谱图像重建与目标检测的U型网络，采用焦点调制替代自注意力机制，在减少40%参数和30%计算量的同时，在两个任务上均达到SOTA性能，适合实时边缘部署。
AI.motivation: 推扫式高光谱成像速度慢，无法实时目标检测；快照式光谱成像虽能瞬时捕获HSI，但其潜力常被耗时的后期重建所削弱。现有方法将重建与检测分离，效率低下，亟需一种联合框架以实现高效实时检测。
AI.method: 提出Focal U-shaped Network (FUN)：1）共享U型骨干网络，通过多任务学习联合进行HSI重建和目标检测；2）引入焦点调制（focal modulation）替代自注意力，在调制空谱特征的同时将计算复杂度从二次降至线性；3）重建任务提供底层光谱信息，检测任务引导语义先验学习，实现互利交互。
AI.result: 在两个任务上均达到SOTA性能，参数减少40%，计算量减少30%；贡献了一个包含363张HSI、8712个标注对象的新数据集。
AI.conclusion: FUN通过自注意力无关的联合框架有效解决了快照式HSI重建与检测的效率瓶颈，具有部署于实时边缘设备的潜力。

title: Generative structure search for efficient and diverse discovery of molecular and crystal structures
summary: Predicting stable and metastable structures is central to molecular and materials discovery, but remains limited by the cost of searching high-dimensional energy landscapes. Deep generative models offer efficient structure sampling, yet their outputs remain shaped by training data and can underexplore minima that are rare but physically relevant. We introduce generative structure search (GSS), a unified framework that formulates diffusion-based generation and random structure search (RSS) as limiting regimes of a common sampling process driven by learned score fields and physical forces. Coupling these drivers lets GSS use data priors to accelerate sampling while retaining energy-guided exploration of local minima. Across molecular and crystalline systems, GSS recovers diverse metastable structures with more than tenfold lower sampling cost than RSS for broad coverage and remains effective for compositions outside the training distribution. The results establish a physically grounded generative search strategy for discovering structures beyond the reach of data-driven sampling alone.

AI.tldr: 提出生成式结构搜索（GSS）统一框架，将扩散生成模型与随机结构搜索结合，在保持物理能量引导探索的同时利用数据先验加速采样，以更低成本发现训练数据分布外的多样亚稳态结构。
AI.motivation: 现有深度生成模型在结构采样中受限于训练数据分布，难以探索稀有但物理相关的能量极小值，而传统随机结构搜索成本高昂。
AI.method: 将扩散模型的得分场与物理力场统一驱动，使数据驱动的生成与能量引导的随机搜索作为同一采样过程的两种极限状态，实现可控耦合。
AI.result: 在分子和晶体系统中，GSS相比随机结构搜索以十分之一以下成本恢复多样亚稳态，且对训练分布外的组分仍有效。
AI.conclusion: 建立了物理引导的生成式搜索策略，能够发现纯数据驱动采样无法触及的结构，为材料发现提供了更高效的新范式。

title: Beyond Semantics: Measuring Fine-Grained Emotion Preservation in Small Language Model-Based Machine Translation
summary: Preserving affective nuance remains a challenge in Machine Translation (MT), where semantic equivalence often takes precedence over emotional fidelity. This paper evaluates the performance of three state-of-the-art Small Language Models (SLMs) -- EuroLLM, Aya Expanse, and Gemma -- in maintaining fine-grained emotions during backtranslation. Using the GoEmotions dataset, which comprises Reddit comments across 28 distinct categories, we assess emotional preservation across five European languages: German, French, Spanish, Italian, and Polish. Specifically, we investigate (i) the inherent capability of these SLMs to retain emotional sentiment, (ii) the efficacy of emotion-aware prompting in improving preservation, and (iii) the performance of ModernBERT as a contemporary alternative to BERT for emotion classification in MT evaluation.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文评估了三款小型语言模型（EuroLLM、Aya Expanse、Gemma）在回译过程中保持细粒度情感的能力，使用GoEmotions数据集（28个情感类别）对五种欧洲语言进行测试，并探究了情感感知提示和ModernBERT分类器的效果。
AI.motivation: 机器翻译中语义等价常优先于情感保真度，保留情感细微差异仍是一大挑战，现有研究对小型语言模型在情感保持方面的能力关注不足。
AI.method: 使用GoEmotions数据集（28类情感）对EuroLLM、Aya Expanse、Gemma三款SLM进行回译测试，覆盖德语、法语、西语、意语、波兰语五种语言；探究SLM固有能力、情感感知提示的效果，并引入ModernBERT作为情感分类评估工具。
AI.result: 研究揭示了不同SLM在情感保持上的差异表现，情感感知提示能改善情感保留效果，ModernBERT作为情感分类器在MT评估中表现优于传统BERT。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为在机器翻译中更好地保留情感细微差异提供了实证依据，指出了情感感知提示和更优情感分类器在评估中的作用。

title: Online semi-supervised perception: Real-time learning without explicit feedback
comment: IEEE Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshop on Online Learning for Computer Vision (CVPR 2010 OLCV)
summary: This paper proposes an algorithm for real-time learning without explicit feedback. The algorithm combines the ideas of semi-supervised learning on graphs and online learning. In particular, it iteratively builds a graphical representation of its world and updates it with observed examples. Labeled examples constitute the initial bias of the algorithm and are provided offline, and a stream of unlabeled examples is collected online to update this bias. We motivate the algorithm, discuss how to implement it efficiently, prove a regret bound on the quality of its solutions, and apply it to the problem of real-time face recognition. Our recognizer runs in real time, and achieves superior precision and recall on 3 challenging video datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合图半监督学习和在线学习的算法，通过少量离线标注样本初始化，在线处理无标签数据流实现实时学习，并在人脸识别任务上取得优异效果。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习需要大量标注数据且无法适应实时变化环境，而无反馈信号的实时学习场景需要能够同时利用少量标注数据和大量无标签数据流的算法。
AI.method: 迭代构建图结构表示环境，离线标注样本作为初始偏置，在线收集无标签样本流持续更新偏置，结合半监督图学习与在线学习框架。
AI.result: 在人脸识别任务上实现实时运行，在三个具有挑战性的视频数据集上取得优越的精确率和召回率。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法能够有效结合离线标注与在线无标签数据流，实现无显式反馈信号的实时学习，并具有理论上的遗憾界保证。

title: MSR:Hybrid Field Modeling for CT-MRI Rigid-Deformable Registration of the Cervical Spine with an Annotated Dataset
summary: Accurate CT-MRI registration of the cervical spine is essential for preoperative planning because this region is anatomically complex,highly variable,and vulnerable to injury of the vertebral arteries and spinal cord. However,cervical CT-MRI registration remains underexplored,particularly for rigid-deformable hybrid modeling,and the lack of high-quality annotated multimodal data further limits progress. To address these challenges, we construct and release a comprehensively annotated CT-MRI dataset, R-D-Reg, and propose MSR, a rigid-deformable hybrid registration framework for complex joint structures. Specifically, MSR includes a rigid registration module for independent local rigid alignment of individual vertebrae and a deformable registration module with an MSL block that combines Mamba-based global modeling and Swin Transformer-based local modeling through adaptive gating. The rigid and deformable deformation fields are then fused to generate a hybrid field that better preserves local anatomical consistency. The code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/ssc1230609-spec/MSR-registration.

AI.tldr: 本文针对颈椎CT-MRI配准这一复杂问题，构建了带标注的数据集R-D-Reg，并提出了一种刚柔混合配准框架MSR，通过独立椎体刚性对齐和基于Mamba与Swin Transformer的门控融合模块实现更优的局部解剖一致性。
AI.motivation: 颈椎区域解剖结构复杂、个体差异大，且椎动脉和脊髓易受损，精准的CT-MRI配准对术前规划至关重要。然而该领域研究不足，尤其是刚柔混合建模方向缺乏探索，且缺少高质量标注多模态数据。
AI.method: 提出MSR框架，包含刚性配准模块（对各椎体独立进行局部刚性对齐）和可变形配准模块（使用MSL块，通过自适应门控融合基于Mamba的全局建模和基于Swin Transformer的局部建模），最后融合刚性和可变形形变场生成混合场，保持局部解剖一致性。
AI.result: 构建并公开了R-D-Reg数据集（全面标注的CT-MRI多模态数据），代码与数据集已在GitHub开源。
AI.conclusion: 所提MSR框架能更好地保持局部解剖结构一致性，解决了颈椎CT-MRI刚柔混合配准的难题。

title: Optimization before Evaluation: Evaluation with Unoptimised Prompts Can be Misleading
comment: Proceedings of the 63rd Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (Volume 6: Industry Track)
summary: Current Large Language Model (LLM) evaluation frameworks utilize the same static prompt template across all models under evaluation. This differs from the common industry practice of using prompt optimization (PO) techniques to optimize the prompt for each model to maximize application performance. In this paper, we investigate the effect of PO towards LLM evaluations. Our results on public academic and internal industry benchmarks show that PO greatly affects the final ranking of models. This highlights the importance of practitioners performing PO per model when conducting evaluations to choose the best model for a given task.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，使用提示优化（PO）技术会显著改变不同LLM在评估中的排名，因此在为任务选择最佳模型时，应对每个模型单独进行提示优化。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM评估框架对所有模型使用相同的静态提示模板，这与业界实践中为每个模型优化提示以最大化性能的做法不符，因此需要研究提示优化对评估结果的影响。
AI.method: 在公开学术基准和内部工业基准上，对比使用静态提示和经过提示优化（PO）后的模型评估结果，分析PO对模型排名的影响。
AI.result: 提示优化显著改变了模型的最终排名。
AI.conclusion: 在评估和选择最优模型时，应针对每个模型单独进行提示优化，而非使用统一的静态提示。

title: Can AI Be a Good Peer Reviewer? A Survey of Peer Review Process, Evaluation, and the Future
summary: Peer review is a multi-stage process involving reviews, rebuttals, meta-reviews, final decisions, and subsequent manuscript revisions. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have motivated methods that assist or automate different stages of this pipeline. In this survey, we synthesize techniques for (i) peer review generation, including fine-tuning strategies, agent-based systems, RL-based methods, and emerging paradigms to enhance generation; (ii) after-review tasks including rebuttals, meta-review and revision aligned to reviews; and (iii) evaluation methods spanning human-centered, reference-based, LLM-based and aspect-oriented. We catalog datasets, compare modeling choices, and discuss limitations, ethical concerns, and future directions. The survey aims to provide practical guidance for building, evaluating, and integrating LLM systems across the full peer review workflow.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了利用大语言模型(LLMs)辅助或自动化同行评审全流程（包括评审生成、 rebuttal、元评审、修订及评估）的技术方法、数据集和未来方向。
AI.motivation: 同行评审是多阶段复杂流程，LLMs的进步为自动化或辅助各阶段提供了可能，但缺乏系统性综述来指导实践。
AI.method: 系统梳理了三类技术：(i)评审生成（微调、智能体、强化学习等）；(ii)评审后任务（rebuttal、元评审、修订）；(iii)评估方法（人工、基于参考、LLM评估、方面导向）。并整理了数据集和建模比较。
AI.result: 汇总了现有数据集，对比了不同建模选择，指出了当前方法的局限性和伦理问题。
AI.conclusion: 为构建、评估和集成覆盖全同行评审工作流的LLM系统提供了实践指南，并指出了未来研究方向。

title: Bayesian policy gradient and actor-critic algorithms
comment: Published in Journal of Machine Learning Research 17(66):1-53, 2016
summary: Policy gradient methods are reinforcement learning algorithms that adapt a parameterized policy by following a performance gradient estimate. Conventional policy gradient methods use Monte-Carlo techniques to estimate the gradient, which tend to have high variance, requiring many samples and resulting in slow convergence. We first propose a Bayesian framework for policy gradient, based on modeling the policy gradient as a Gaussian process. This reduces the number of samples needed to obtain accurate gradient estimates. Moreover, estimates of the natural gradient and a measure of the uncertainty in the gradient estimates, namely, the gradient covariance, are provided at little extra cost. Since the proposed framework considers system trajectories as its basic observable unit, it does not require the dynamics within trajectories to be of any particular form, and can be extended to partially observable problems. On the downside, it cannot exploit the Markov property when the system is Markovian. To address this, we supplement our Bayesian policy gradient framework with a new actor-critic learning model in which a Bayesian class of non-parametric critics, based on Gaussian process temporal difference learning, is used. Such critics model the action-value function as a Gaussian process, allowing Bayes rule to be used to compute the posterior distribution over action-value functions, conditioned on the observed data. Appropriate choices of the policy parameterization and of the prior covariance (kernel) between action-values yield closed-form expressions for the posterior of the gradient of the expected return with respect to the policy parameters. We perform detailed experimental comparisons of the proposed Bayesian policy gradient and actor-critic algorithms with classic Monte-Carlo based policy gradient methods, on a number of reinforcement learning problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种贝叶斯策略梯度框架，通过将策略梯度建模为高斯过程来减少样本需求，并进一步结合基于高斯过程时序差分学习的演员-评论家模型来处理马尔可夫性问题。实验表明，该方法在多个强化学习问题上优于传统蒙特卡洛策略梯度方法。
AI.motivation: 传统策略梯度方法使用蒙特卡洛估计梯度，方差大、样本需求多、收敛慢。作者希望利用贝叶斯方法减少样本量、提供自然梯度和不确定性估计，同时解决无法利用马尔可夫性的问题。
AI.method: (1) 将策略梯度建模为高斯过程，以轨迹为基本观测单元，降低梯度估计方差；(2) 在此基础上引入贝叶斯演员-评论家框架，使用高斯过程时序差分学习（GPTD）作为非参数评论家，建模动作值函数的后验分布；(3) 通过合适的策略参数化和核函数，得到期望回报梯度的闭式解。
AI.result: 在多个强化学习问题上，所提出的贝叶斯策略梯度和演员-评论家算法在样本效率和收敛速度上均优于传统蒙特卡洛策略梯度方法。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯框架能有效降低策略梯度的方差，减少样本量，同时提供自然梯度和不确定性估计；结合GPTD的演员-评论家模型可弥补原方法无法利用马尔可夫性的缺陷。

title: EviMem: Evidence-Gap-Driven Iterative Retrieval for Long-Term Conversational Memory
summary: Long-term conversational memory requires retrieving evidence scattered across multiple sessions, yet single-pass retrieval fails on temporal and multi-hop questions. Existing iterative methods refine queries via generated content or document-level signals, but none explicitly diagnoses the evidence gap, namely what is missing from the accumulated retrieval set, leaving query refinement untargeted. We present EviMem, combining IRIS (Iterative Retrieval via Insufficiency Signals), a closed-loop framework that detects evidence gaps through sufficiency evaluation, diagnoses what is missing, and drives targeted query refinement, with LaceMem (Layered Architecture for Conversational Evidence Memory), a coarse-to-fine memory hierarchy supporting fine-grained gap diagnosis. On LoCoMo, EviMem improves Judge Accuracy over MIRIX on temporal (73.3% to 81.6%) and multi-hop (65.9% to 85.2%) questions at 4.5x lower latency. Code: https://github.com/AIGeeksGroup/EviMem.

AI.tldr: EviMem是一个结合IRIS闭环框架和LaceMem层级记忆结构的检索系统，通过检测证据缺口并驱动精准查询优化，在时空和多跳问答任务上显著优于现有方法，同时降低4.5倍延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有长对话记忆检索方法在时序和多跳问题上表现不佳，因为它们依赖单次检索或生成式查询优化，缺乏对"证据缺口"（即已检索集合中缺失的信息）的显式诊断，导致查询优化缺乏针对性。
AI.method: 提出EviMem，包含两个核心组件：(1) IRIS（Iterative Retrieval via Insufficiency Signals）——闭环检索框架，通过充分性评估检测证据缺口、诊断缺失内容、驱动精准查询优化；(2) LaceMem（Layered Architecture for Conversational Evidence Memory）——从粗到细的层级记忆结构，支持细粒度证据缺口诊断。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo基准上，EviMem在时序问题（73.3%→81.6%）和多跳问题（65.9%→85.2%）上的Judge Accuracy均超越MIRIX，同时延迟降低4.5倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模和诊断证据缺口，能够显著提升多会话对话记忆的检索质量，实现更高效、更精准的长程问答。

title: From Context to Skills: Can Language Models Learn from Context Skillfully?
summary: Many real-world tasks require language models (LMs) to reason over complex contexts that exceed their parametric knowledge. This calls for context learning, where LMs directly learn relevant knowledge from the given context. An intuitive solution is inference-time skill augmentation: extracting the rules and procedures from context into natural-language skills. However, constructing such skills for context learning scenarios faces two challenges: the prohibitive cost of manual skill annotation for long, technically dense contexts, and the lack of external feedback for automated skill construction, since there is no automatic signal to tell whether a proposed skill is helpful. In this paper, we propose Ctx2Skill, a self-evolving framework that autonomously discovers, refines, and selects context-specific skills without human supervision or external feedback. At its core, a multi-agent self-play loop has a Challenger that generates probing tasks and rubrics, a Reasoner that attempts to solve them guided by an evolving skill set, and a neutral Judge that provides binary feedback. Crucially, both the Challenger and the Reasoner evolve through accumulated skills: dedicated Proposer and Generator agents analyze failure cases and synthesize them into targeted skill updates for both sides, enabling automated skill discovery and refinement. To prevent adversarial collapse caused by increasingly extreme task generation and over-specialized skill accumulation, we further introduce a Cross-time Replay mechanism that identifies the skill set achieving the best balance across representative cases for the Reasoner side, ensuring robust and generalizable skill evolution. The resulting skills can be plugged into any language model to obtain better context learning capability. Evaluated on four context learning tasks from CL-bench, Ctx2Skill consistently improves solving rates across backbone models.

AI.tldr: Ctx2Skill是一个无需人工监督或外部反馈的自我进化框架，通过多智能体自我博弈循环，自动从上下文中发现、提炼和选择技能，从而提升语言模型在复杂上下文中的学习能力。在CL-bench的四个任务上，该方法持续提升了多种骨干模型的求解率。
AI.motivation: 在上下文学习场景中，从长且技术密集的上下文中手动构建技能代价高昂，且缺乏外部反馈信号来自动判断构建的技能是否有用。因此需要一种无需人工监督和外部反馈的自动化技能构建方法。
AI.method: 提出Ctx2Skill框架，核心是包含三个角色的多智能体自我博弈循环：(1) Challenger生成探测任务和评分标准；(2) Reasoner在技能引导下求解任务；(3) Judge提供二元反馈。Proposer和Generator分析失败案例并合成技能更新。引入Cross-time Replay机制避免对抗性崩溃，选择最佳平衡的技能集合。
AI.result: 在CL-bench的四个上下文学习任务上，Ctx2Skill持续提升了不同骨干模型的求解率，验证了方法的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Ctx2Skill实现了无需人工监督的自动化技能发现与进化，显著提升了语言模型在复杂上下文中的学习能力，且生成的技能可迁移到任何语言模型上使用。

title: DPN-LE: Dual Personality Neuron Localization and Editing for Large Language Models
summary: With the widespread adoption of large language models (LLMs), understanding their personality representation mechanisms has become critical. As a novel paradigm in Personality Editing, most existing methods employ neuron-editing to locate and modify LLM neurons, requiring changes to numerous neurons and leading to significant performance degradation. This raises a fundamental question: Are all modified neurons directly related to personality representation? In this work, we investigate and quantify this specificity through assessments of general capability impact and representation-level patterns. We find that: 1) Current methods can change personalities but reduce overall performance. 2) Neurons are multifunctional, connecting personality traits and general knowledge. 3) Opposing personality traits demonstrate distinctly mutually exclusive representation patterns. Motivated by these findings, we propose DPN-LE (Dual Personality Neuron Localization and Editing), which identifies personality-specific neurons by contrasting MLP activations between high-trait and low-trait samples. DPN-LE constructs layer-wise steering vectors and applies dual-criterion filtering based on Cohen's $d$ effect size and activation magnitude to isolate mutually exclusive neuron subsets. Sparse linear intervention on these neurons enables precise personality control at inference time. Using only 1,000 contrastive sample pairs per trait, DPN-LE intervenes on $\sim$0.5\% of neurons while achieving competitive personality control and substantially better capability preservation across reasoning tasks. Experiments on LLaMA-3-8B-Instruct and Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct demonstrate the effectiveness and generalizability of our approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DPN-LE方法，通过对比高低特质样本的MLP激活，定位与人格相关的特定神经元，仅干预约0.5%的神经元即可实现精确人格控制，同时大幅保留模型通用能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于神经元编辑的人格编辑方法需要修改大量神经元，导致模型性能显著下降。作者质疑是否所有被修改的神经元都与人格表征直接相关，并希望找到只影响人格而非通用能力的神经元子集。
AI.method: 通过对比高/低人格特质样本的MLP激活，构建逐层引导向量，基于Cohen's d效应量和激活强度进行双准则过滤，分离出互斥的神经元子集，对这部分稀疏神经元进行线性干预。
AI.result: 仅干预~0.5%的神经元即可实现竞争性的人格控制效果，且在推理任务上显著提升了能力保持性。在LLaMA-3-8B-Instruct和Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct上验证了有效性和泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 神经元是多功能的，同时连接人格特质和通用知识；相反人格特质呈现互斥的表征模式；DPN-LE通过精准定位人格特异性神经元，在人格编辑中实现了控制精度与能力保持的良好平衡。

title: Learning from a single labeled face and a stream of unlabeled data
comment: Published at IEEE International Conference on Automatic Face and Gesture Recognition (FG 2013). doi:10.1109/FG.2013.6553720
summary: Face recognition from a single image per person is a challenging problem because the training sample is extremely small. We consider a variation of this problem. In our problem, we recognize only one person, and there are no labeled data for any other person. This setting naturally arises in authentication on personal computers and mobile devices, and poses additional challenges because it lacks negative examples. We formalize our problem as one-class classification, and propose and analyze an algorithm that learns a non-parametric model of the face from a single labeled image and a stream of unlabeled data. In many domains, for instance when a person interacts with a computer with a camera, unlabeled data are abundant and easy to utilize. This is the first paper that investigates how these data can help in learning better models in the single-image-per-person setting. Our method is evaluated on a dataset of 43 people and we show that these people can be recognized 90% of time at nearly zero false positives. This recall is 25+% higher than the recall of our best performing baseline. Finally, we conduct a comprehensive sensitivity analysis of our algorithm and provide a guideline for setting its parameters in practice.

AI.tldr: 本文研究单张人脸图像认证问题（仅有一个目标人物，无负样本），将其形式化为单类分类问题，提出一种利用单个标注图像和大量无标注数据流的非参数模型学习算法，在43人数据集上达到90%召回率且近乎零误报。
AI.motivation: 个人设备（如电脑、手机）上的身份认证场景中，通常只有目标用户本人的人脸数据可用，缺乏其他人的负样本，传统的监督学习方法效果不佳。作者希望利用设备上极易获取的大量无标注数据来提升单样本人脸识别的性能。
AI.method: 将问题形式化为单类分类（one-class classification）；提出一种非参数模型算法，从单张标注图像开始学习，并持续从无标注数据流中增量更新模型。
AI.result: 在43人数据集上，该方法达到90%召回率且近乎零误报；相比最佳基线方法，召回率提升25%以上。
AI.conclusion: 无标注数据能有效帮助单样本人脸识别；通过全面的敏感性分析给出了实际应用中参数设置的建议。

title: Deep Learning-Based Segmentation of Peritoneal Cancer Index Regions from CT Imaging
comment: Accepted for presentation at Computer Assisted Radiology and Surgery (CARS) 2026
summary: Peritoneal metastases are currently assessed using diagnostic laparoscopy to determine Sugarbaker's Peritoneal Cancer Index (sPCI), which works by dividing the abdomen into 13 regions and scoring each region based on tumor size. A recent consensus study defined 3D regions to facilitate a radiological PCI (rPCI), providing standardized anatomical regions for imaging-based assessment. Despite its clinical value, sPCI is invasive and lacks a standardized imaging counterpart. In this study, we propose a deep learning-based approach to automatically segment the rPCI regions on CT. We evaluate nnU-Net and Swin UNETR on 62 CT scans with rPCI regions manually annotated by three clinical researchers and validated by two expert radiologists. Performance was assessed using five-fold cross-validation with the Dice Similarity Coefficient (Dice), 95th percentile Hausdorff distance and Average Surface Distance. nnU-Net achieved an overall Dice of 0.82, approaching interobserver agreement (0.88) and outperforming Swin UNETR (0.76), with remaining challenges primarily in right flank and small-bowel regions. These results demonstrate feasibility of automated rPCI segmentation, laying the foundation for non-invasive, imaging-based assessment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度学习（nnU-Net）自动分割CT图像中腹腔转移区域（rPCI），Dice达0.82，接近专家间一致性（0.88），为无创影像评估腹膜转移奠定基础。
AI.motivation: 现有腹膜转移评估依赖有创诊断腹腔镜（sPCI），缺乏标准化的无创影像评估手段。
AI.method: 在62例CT上由临床研究人员标注rPCI区域（经放射科专家验证），使用nnU-Net和Swin UNETR进行自动分割，采用五折交叉验证评估。
AI.result: nnU-Net总体Dice为0.82，接近专家间一致性0.88，优于Swin UNETR的0.76；右腹侧壁和小肠区域仍存在挑战。
AI.conclusion: 自动rPCI分割可行，为基于影像的无创腹膜转移评估提供了基础。

title: Fairness for distribution network operations and planning
comment: 16 pages, 0 figures, 2 tables, CIRED Conference Workshop Brussels 2026
summary: The incorporation of fairness into the distribution network (DN) planning and operation has become a key goal of recent studies. The cost of implementing fairness, denominated the price of fairness (PoF), covers the efficiency that is renounced for attaining social cohesion through fair outcomes. Locational disparity makes fairness schemes emerge to level the consumers playing field. However, fairness encompasses a range of notions. From egalitarian to merit-based criteria, various metrics are implemented as a tool for measuring equitable utility distribution. These have different mathematical complexities, from linear to non-linear programming cases, which affect their overall applicability. Hence, this study compiles the overarching fairness notions and metrics, reviewing how these affect stakeholders and the inherent mathematical optimisation in resource allocation problems. The aim is to support consistent and transparent planning and decision-making within DN operations.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了配电网规划与运行中公平性的概念、度量标准及其数学优化方法，探讨了公平性代价（PoF）对效率的影响，旨在为资源分配问题提供透明一致的决策支持。
AI.motivation: 配电网规划与运行中纳入公平性已成为关键目标，但公平性涵盖从平均主义到功绩主义等多种概念，不同度量标准具有不同的数学复杂度，影响其实际适用性。因此，需要系统梳理这些公平性概念与度量方法。
AI.method: 本文为综述性研究，系统整理了配电网资源分配问题中的各类公平性概念（如平均主义、功绩主义等）及其对应的数学优化模型（从线性到非线性规划），并分析了不同公平性度量对利益相关者的影响。
AI.result: 揭示了公平性代价（PoF）的内涵——为实现公平结果而牺牲的效率；指出不同公平性度量具有不同的数学复杂性（线性至非线性规划），影响其在配电网规划与运行中的整体适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该综述旨在支持配电网运营中一致且透明的规划与决策制定，帮助决策者在公平性与效率之间做出权衡。

title: Statistical Channel Fingerprint Construction for Massive MIMO: A Unified Tensor Learning Framework
summary: Channel fingerprint (CF) is considered a key enabler for facilitating the acquisition of channel state information (CSI) in massive multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) communication systems. In this work, we investigate a novel type of CF that stores statistical CSI (sCSI) at each potential location, referred to as statistical CF (sCF). Specifically, we reveal the relationship between sCSI, namely the channel spatial covariance matrix (CSCM), and the channel power angular spectrum (CPAS). Building on this foundation, we construct a unified tensor representation of the sCF and further reduce its dimension by exploiting the eigenvalue decomposition of the CSCM and its correlation with the PAS. Considering the practical constraints imposed by measurement cost, privacy, and security, we focus on three representative scenarios and uniformly formulate them as tensor restoration tasks. To this end, we propose a unified tensor-based learning architecture, termed LPWTNet. The architecture incorporates a closed-form Laplacian pyramid (LP) decomposition and reconstruction framework that replaces the traditional encoder-decoder structure, enabling efficient inference while capturing multi-scale frequency subband characteristics of the sCF. Additionally, a shared mask learning strategy is introduced to adaptively refine high-frequency sCF components through level-wise adjustments. To achieve a larger receptive field without over-parameterization, we further propose a small-kernel convolution mechanism based on the wavelet transform (WT), which decouples convolution across different frequency components of the sCF and enhances feature extraction efficiency. Extensive experiments show that the proposed approach delivers competitive reconstruction accuracy and computational efficiency across various sCF construction scenarios when compared with state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于张量学习的统一架构LPWTNet，用于在大规模MIMO通信系统中通过统计信道指纹（sCF）恢复信道空间协方差矩阵（CSCM），利用拉普拉斯金字塔分解、共享掩码学习和小核卷积（基于小波变换）实现跨场景的高效重建。
AI.motivation: 在大规模MIMO系统中，信道指纹（CF）有助于获取信道状态信息（CSI）。然而，实际中受限于测量成本、隐私和安全问题，需要一种能够从部分/受限观测中恢复统计CSI（sCF）的方法。
AI.method: 1. 揭示sCSI（CSCM）与信道功率角谱（CPAS）之间的关系，构建sCF的统一张量表示，并利用特征值分解降维。2. 提出LPWTNet架构，包含：闭式拉普拉斯金字塔（LP）分解与重建替代传统编码器-解码器；共享掩码学习策略逐级自适应细化高频分量；基于小波变换（WT）的小核卷积机制，在不同频率分量上解耦卷积，提升特征提取效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法在多种sCF构建场景下，相比现有基线方法，在重建精度和计算效率方面均具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: LPWTNet通过多尺度频率子带特征捕获、自适应高频细化以及小核解耦卷积，有效实现了统计信道指纹的高效恢复，适用于受测量成本、隐私等限制的实际通信场景。

title: RayFormer: Modeling Inter- and Intra-Ray Similarity for NeRF-Based Video Snapshot Compressive Imaging
summary: Video snapshot compressive imaging (SCI) enables the reconstruction of dynamic scenes from a single snapshot measurement. Recently, NeRF-based methods have shown promising reconstruction performance. However, such methods typically adopt random ray sampling strategies and fail to capture content structural similarities, resulting in limited reconstruction quality. To address these issues, we first propose a patch-level ray sampling strategy to enable the modeling of content structure. Then, we propose an Inter- and Intra-Ray Transformer (RayFormer) to capture the structural similarities, modeling both inter-ray similarities among spatially neighboring points at the same depth and intra-ray correlations between adjacent points along the viewing ray. Finally, benefiting from the patch-level sampling strategy, the total variation prior is incorporated into the objective function to enhance spatial smoothness and suppress artifacts. Experiments in both simulated and real-world scenes demonstrate that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) reconstruction performance.

AI.tldr: 针对视频快照压缩成像（SCI）中基于NeRF的方法因随机射线采样策略导致重建质量受限的问题，本文提出补丁级射线采样策略和Inter-Intra Ray Transformer（RayFormer），通过建模空间邻域点间的跨射线相似性和沿视角射线的帧内相关性，并引入全变分先验，在模拟和真实场景中均取得SOTA重建性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于NeRF的SCI重建方法采用随机射线采样策略，未能捕捉内容的结极相似性，导致重建质量有限。
AI.method: 1) 提出补丁级（patch-level）射线采样策略，建模内容结极；2) 提出Inter- and Intra-Ray Transformer (RayFormer)，同时捕捉空间邻域点间的跨射线相似性和沿视角射线的帧内相关性；3) 利用补丁采样策略引入全变分先验（TV prior）增强空间平滑性、抑制伪影。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实场景实验中均达到SOTA重建性能。
AI.conclusion: 补丁级采样+RayFormer+TV先验的组合有效提升了SCI的重建质量，验证了捕捉结极相似性对NeRF类方法的必要性。

title: The TEA Nets framework combines AI and cognitive network science to model targets, events and actors in text
summary: We introduce Target-Event-Agent Networks (TEA Nets) as a computational framework to extract subjects (``Agents"), verbs (``Events"), and objects (``Targets") from texts. Grounded in cognitive network science and artificial intelligence, TEA Nets are implemented as an open-source Python library. We test TEA Nets in three case studies, demonstrating the framework's ability to perform interpretable emotion detection, semantic frame analyses, and linguistic inquiries across conspiracy texts and textual responses generated by LLMs. In the LOCO conspiracy corpus, TEA Nets revealed that highly conspiratorial narratives (4,227 texts) linked personal pronouns (``I", ``you", ``we") with the same actions twice as frequently as low-similarity conspiracy narratives. High-conspiracy narratives connected person-focused elements (``you", ``people") through actions eliciting anger above the random baseline ($z = 2.63, p < .05$), a trend absent in low-similarity conspiracy narratives, which emphasized scientific actors (``researcher", ``scientist"). In the HOPE and CounseLLMe datasets of 212 (human) and 200 (LLM-based) psychotherapy transcripts, respectively, TEA Nets highlighted emotional differences. When expressing feelings, Claude 3 Haiku, GPT-3.5, and humans used sad words with higher frequency than random expectations but Haiku expressed sadness with lower emotional intensity than humans ($U = 1243.5, p = .036$). We discuss these differences in the context of psychotherapy training on LLM-simulated patients. Our results show that Target-Event-Agent Networks can extract relevant emotional, syntactic, and semantic insights from narratives, opening new avenues for text analysis with cognitive network science.

AI.tldr: 本文提出目标-事件-主体网络（TEA Nets）作为一种从文本中提取主语（Agent）、动词（Event）和宾语（Target）的计算框架，并在阴谋论文本和LLM生成的对话数据中验证了其在情感检测、语义框架分析和语言学分析中的有效性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有的文本分析方法在提取主体、事件和目标的语义关系方面存在局限，缺乏一种既能进行认知网络科学分析又具备可解释性的统一框架。作者希望开发一种开源工具，能够从叙事文本中提取结构化的三元组关系，用于情感检测、语义分析等任务。
AI.method: 提出TEA Nets框架，基于认知网络科学和人工智能，实现为一个开源Python库。通过三个案例研究（LOCO阴谋论语料库、HOPE人类心理治疗数据集、CounseLLMe LLM生成的心理治疗回复）进行验证，采用随机基线比较和统计显著性检验（z检验、U检验）。
AI.result: 在LOCO语料库中，高阴谋叙事中代词的共现频率是低阴谋叙事的两倍；高阴谋叙事通过引发愤怒的行动连接人称元素（z=2.63, p<.05），而低阴谋叙事强调科学行动者。在心理治疗数据中，Claude 3 Haiku、GPT-3.5和人类使用悲伤词汇的频率均高于随机基线，但Haiku的情感强度显著低于人类（U=1243.5, p=.036）。
AI.conclusion: TEA Nets能够从叙事中提取相关的情感、句法和语义洞见，为认知网络科学驱动的文本分析开辟了新途径，并为LLM模拟患者的心理治疗训练提供了有价值的对比分析。

title: Models Recall What They Violate: Constraint Adherence in Multi-Turn LLM Ideation
summary: When researchers iteratively refine ideas with large language models, do the models preserve fidelity to the original objective? We introduce DriftBench, a benchmark for evaluating constraint adherence in multi-turn LLM-assisted scientific ideation. Across 2,146 scored benchmark runs spanning seven models from five providers (including two open-weight), four interaction conditions, and 38 research briefs from 24 scientific domains, we find that iterative pressure reliably increases structural complexity and often reduces adherence to original constraints. A restatement probe reveals a dissociation between declarative recall and behavioral adherence, as models accurately restate constraints they simultaneously violate. The knows-but-violates (KBV) rate, measuring constraint non-compliance despite preserved recall, ranges from 8% to 99% across models. Structured checkpointing partially reduces KBV rates but does not close the dissociation, and complexity inflation persists. Human validation against blind raters confirms that the LLM judge under-detects constraint violations, making reported constraint adherence scores conservative. Sensitivity analyses confirm the findings are robust to temperature (0.7 vs.\ 1.0) and pressure type (novelty vs.\ rigor). We release all briefs, prompts, rubrics, transcripts, and scores as an open benchmark.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DriftBench基准，用于评估多轮LLM辅助科学构思中模型对原始约束的遵循能力。实验发现迭代压力会持续增加结构复杂性并降低约束遵守率，模型存在"知道但违反"的解离现象（KBV率达8%-99%），且结构化检查点只能部分缓解该问题。
AI.motivation: 在研究人员使用LLM反复迭代优化科学想法时，模型是否能够保持对原始目标的忠实度？现有研究缺乏对此问题的系统性评估。
AI.method: 构建DriftBench基准，包含2146个评分运行、7种模型、4种交互条件、38份研究简报（覆盖24个科学领域）。通过约束遵守率、KBV率等指标评估模型行为，并引入人类验证确认LLM评判的保守性。
AI.result: 迭代压力可靠地增加结构复杂性并降低约束遵守率；KBV率在8%-99%之间；结构化检查点部分降低KBV率但无法消除解离；复杂性膨胀持续存在；LLM评判存在漏检偏差。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM在迭代科学构思中存在"知道但违反"的解离现象，约束遵守能力严重不足，亟需更好的机制来保证模型在辅助科研时对原始目标的忠实性。

title: Privacy-Preserving Federated Learning via Differential Privacy and Homomorphic Encryption for Cardiovascular Disease Risk Modeling
summary:
Protecting sensitive health data while enabling collaborative analysis is a central challenge in healthcare. Traditional machine learning (ML) requires institutions to pool anonymized patient records, centralizing analytical development and privacy risks at a single site. Privacy-enhancing technologies (PETs), including Differential Privacy (DP) and Homomorphic Encryption (HE), can mitigate these risks. However, they are mainly studied in conventional data-sharing settings and often introduce trade-offs, including reduced model utility, higher computational cost, and increased implementation complexity. Federated Learning (FL) reduces data centralization by enabling institutions to train models locally and share only model updates. Nevertheless, FL does not eliminate privacy risks, as shared parameters or gradients may still reveal sensitive information. Integrating DP or HE into FL can strengthen privacy guarantees, yet their comparative performance and deployment implications in real-world healthcare settings remain unclear.
  We systematically evaluated DP and HE integration in FL under real-world conditions, comparing them with standard FL and centralized ML (cML) to quantify privacy-utility trade-offs in multi-institutional settings. Using nationwide Swedish healthcare data, we evaluated cardiovascular disease risk prediction using logistic regression (LR) and neural network (NN) learners. FL with HE achieved performance comparable to cML but introduced measurable cryptographic overhead, particularly in the NN implementation. FL with DP incurred lower computational cost; however, LR was more sensitive to calibrated noise than the NN, resulting in greater performance degradation. Our findings provide practical guidance for deploying privacy-preserving FL in fragmented healthcare systems.

AI.tldr: 本研究系统评估了在联邦学习（FL）中集成差分隐私（DP）和同态加密（HE）的实际效果，利用瑞典全国医疗数据预测心血管疾病风险。结果表明，FL+HE性能接近集中式ML但计算开销大，FL+DP计算成本低但逻辑回归模型对噪声更敏感、性能下降更明显。
AI.motivation: 解决医疗数据共享中隐私保护与协作分析之间的矛盾，现有隐私增强技术（DP、HE）在传统数据共享场景下存在效用、成本和复杂性权衡，而在联邦学习中集成这些技术的实际性能和部署影响尚不明确。
AI.method: 在联邦学习框架下分别集成差分隐私（DP）和同态加密（HE），使用瑞典全国医疗数据，采用逻辑回归（LR）和神经网络（NN）两种学习器进行心血管疾病风险预测，并与标准FL及集中式ML进行系统比较。
AI.result: FL+HE性能接近集中式ML，但神经网络实现中存在显著的加密计算开销；FL+DP计算成本较低，但逻辑回归相比神经网络对校准噪声更敏感，导致更大的性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 为在碎片化医疗系统中部署隐私保护联邦学习提供了实用指导，揭示了不同隐私技术在实际部署中的权衡取舍。

title: A generalised pre-training strategy for deep learning networks in semantic segmentation of remotely sensed images
summary: In the segmentation of remotely sensed images, deep learning models are typically pre-trained using large image databases like ImageNet before fine-tuned on domain-specific datasets. However, the performance of these fine-tuned models is often hindered by the large domain gaps (i.e., differences in scenes and modalities) between ImageNet's images and remotely sensed images being processed. Therefore, many researchers have undertaken efforts to establish large-scale domain-specific image datasets for pre-training, aiming to enhance model performance. However, establishing such datasets is often challenging, requiring significant effort, and these datasets often exhibit limited generaliza-bility to other application scenarios. To address these issues, this study introduces a novel yet simple pre-training strategy designed to guide a model away from learning domain-specific features in a pre-training dataset during pre-training, thereby improving the generalisation ability of the pre-trained model. To evaluate the strategy's effectiveness, deep learning models are pre-trained on ImageNet and subsequently fine-tuned on four semantic segmentation datasets with diverse scenes and modalities, including iSAID, MFNet, PST900 and Potsdam. Experimental results show that the proposed pre-training strategy led to state-of-the-art accuracies on all four datasets, namely 67.4% mIoU for iSAID, 56.9% mIoU for MFNet, 84.22% mIoU for PST900, 91.88% mF1 for Potsdam. This research lays the groundwork for developing a unified foundation model applicable to both computer vision and remote sensing applications.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新型预训练策略，引导模型在学习过程中避免过度关注预训练数据集的领域特定特征，从而提升遥感图像分割的泛化能力，在四个数据集上取得SOTA结果。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像分割中，基于ImageNet预训练的模型因领域差异（场景和模态）性能受限，而建立大规模领域专用数据集又成本高、泛化性差，亟需一种更优的预训练方法。
AI.method: 提出一种简单新颖的预训练策略，在ImageNet预训练阶段引导模型避免学习领域特定特征，从而提升预训练模型的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在iSAID(67.4% mIoU)、MFNet(56.9% mIoU)、PST900(84.22% mIoU)、Potsdam(91.88% mF1)四个遥感分割数据集上均取得SOTA精度。
AI.conclusion: 该策略为开发适用于计算机视觉和遥感的统一基础模型奠定了基础。

title: When Agents Evolve, Institutions Follow
summary: Across millennia, complex societies have faced the same coordination problem of how to organize collective action among cognitively bounded and informationally incomplete individuals. Different civilizations developed different political institutions to answer the same basic questions of who proposes, who reviews, who executes, and how errors are corrected. We argue that multi-agent systems built on large language models face the same challenge. Their central problem is not only individual intelligence, but collective organization. Historical institutions therefore provide a structured design space for multi-agent architectures, making key trade-offs between efficiency and error correction, centralization and distribution, and specialization and redundancy empirically testable. We translate seven historical political institutions, spanning four canonical governance patterns, into executable multi-agent architectures and evaluate them under identical conditions across three large language models and two benchmarks. We find that governance topology strongly shapes collective performance. Within a single model, the gap between the best and worst institution exceeds 57 percentage points, while the optimal architecture shifts systematically with model capability and task characteristics. These results suggest that collective intelligence will not advance through a single optimal organizational form, but through governance mechanisms that can be reselected and reconfigured as tasks and capabilities evolve. More broadly, this points to a transition from \textbf{self-evolving agents} to the \textbf{self-evolving multi-agent system}. The code is available on \href{https://github.com/cf3i/SocialSystemArena}{GitHub}.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了从古代文明政治制度到多智能体系统治理结构的映射，发现不同的治理拓扑（如民主、君主制等）对LLM多智能体系统性能影响巨大，最优架构随模型能力和任务特征动态变化，提出了从"自演化智能体"到"自演化多智能体系统"的范式转变。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统的核心问题不仅是个体智能，更是集体组织方式。历史政治制度经过数千年演化，已经探索了不同的集体行动解决方案，为多智能体架构设计提供了结构化的设计空间。
AI.method: 将七种历史政治制度（涵盖四种典型治理模式）转化为可执行的多智能体架构，在三个不同LLM和两个基准上进行了相同的实验评估。
AI.result: 治理拓扑强烈影响集体性能。同一模型下，最佳与最差制度之间的性能差距超过57个百分点。最优架构随模型能力和任务特征系统性地变化。
AI.conclusion: 集体智能不会通过单一的、最优的组织形式推进，而是需要可重新选择和重新配置的治理机制。研究指向从"自演化智能体"到"自演化多智能体系统"的转变。

title: Ease of dependency distance minimization in star-like structures
summary: The syntactic structure of a sentence can be represented as a tree where edges indicate syntactic dependencies between words. When that structure is a star, it has been demonstrated that the head should be placed in the middle of the linear arrangement according to the principle of syntactic dependency distance minimization. However, hubs of stars tend to be put at one of the ends, against that principle. Here we address two questions: (1) How difficult is it to minimize dependency distance? (2) Why anti dependency distance minimization effects have been found in star structures but not in path structures? The ease of optimization is determined by the shape of the optimization landscape. It was demonstrated that the landscape of star structures is quasiconvex (Ferrer-i-Cancho 2015, Language Dynamics and Change). As for (1), here we show that it is indeed convex (a particular case of quasiconvexity) both for star trees and quasistar trees and thus the distance-based optimization problem is simpler than previously believed. As for (2), we argue that (a) competing principles, rather than the difficulty of optimization, must be the actual reason for anti-dependency distance minimization effects and that (b) dependency distance minimization on star-like structures is less rewarding compared to other structures.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了句法树中依存距离最小化的优化难度，发现星形结构的优化景观实际上是凸函数（比之前认为的拟凸更简单），并论证了反依存距离最小化效应源于竞争原则而非优化难度，且星形结构中距离最小化的收益较低。
AI.motivation: 回答两个核心问题：(1) 最小化依存距离有多难？(2) 为什么星形结构中存在反依存距离最小化效应，而路径结构中却没有？
AI.method: 通过分析优化景观的形状（凸性）来判断优化难度，分别针对星形树和准星形树进行理论证明；并通过竞争原则和收益分析来解释反距离最小化现象。
AI.result: (1) 星形树和准星形树的优化景观是凸函数，比之前证明的拟凸更简单，优化问题比预期更容易；(2) 反依存距离最小化效应的真正原因是竞争原则的存在，以及星形结构中距离最小化的收益相对较低。
AI.conclusion: 星形结构的依存距离优化比预期简单，但反最小化现象并非源于优化难度，而是需要从竞争原则和收益差异的角度理解。

title: ZAYAN: Disentangled Contrastive Transformer for Tabular Remote Sensing Data
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 28th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR 2026) at Lyon, France. Code available at https://github.com/zadid6pretam/ZAYAN. PyPI package: pip install zayan
summary: Learning informative representations from tabular data in remote sensing and environmental science is challenging due to heterogeneity, scarce labels, and redundancy among features. We present ZAYAN (Zero-Anchor dYnamic feAture eNcoding), a self-supervised, feature-centric contrastive framework for tabular data. ZAYAN performs contrastive learning at the feature rather than sample level, removing the need for explicit anchor selection and any reliance on class labels, while encouraging a redundancy-minimized, disentangled embedding space. The framework has two modules: ZAYAN-CL, which pretrains feature embeddings via a zero-anchor contrastive objective with dynamic perturbations and masking, and ZAYAN-T, a Transformer that conditions on these embeddings for downstream classification. Across eight datasets, including six remote-sensing tabular benchmarks and two remote-sensing-driven flood-prediction tables from satellite and GIS products, ZAYAN achieves superior accuracy, robustness, and generalization over tabular deep learning baselines, with consistent gains under label scarcity and distribution shift. These results indicate that feature-level contrastive learning and dynamic feature encoding provide an effective recipe for learning from tabular sensing data.

AI.tldr: ZAYAN是一个针对遥感与环境科学表格数据的自监督对比学习框架，通过在特征层面而非样本层面进行对比学习，无需锚点选择和标签信息，实现冗余最小化的解耦嵌入空间，在八个数据集上优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 遥感与环境科学中的表格数据存在异质性、标签稀缺和特征冗余等问题，现有方法难以从这类数据中学习到有效的表征。
AI.method: 提出ZAYAN框架，包含两个模块：ZAYAN-CL模块通过零锚点对比学习目标（动态扰动与掩码）预训练特征嵌入；ZAYAN-T模块利用Transformer对特征嵌入进行条件化处理，用于下游分类任务。
AI.result: 在8个数据集（含6个遥感表格基准和2个洪水预测表格）上，ZAYAN在准确性、鲁棒性和泛化性方面均优于表格深度学习基线，在标签稀缺和分布偏移场景下表现一致提升。
AI.conclusion: 特征级对比学习与动态特征编码为处理遥感传感数据的表格数据提供了有效的学习范式。

title: Linguistically Informed Multimodal Fusion for Vietnamese Scene-Text Image Captioning: Dataset, Graph Framework, and Phonological Attention
summary: Scene-text image captioning requires fusing three information streams -- visual features, OCR-detected text, and linguistic knowledge -- to generate descriptions that faithfully integrate text visible in images. Existing fusion approaches treat text as language-agnostic, which fails for Vietnamese: a tonal language where diacritics alter word meaning, OCR errors are pervasive, and word boundaries are ambiguous. We argue that Vietnamese scene-text captioning demands \textit{linguistically informed multimodal fusion}, where language-specific structural knowledge is explicitly incorporated into the fusion mechanism. Motivated from these insights, we propose \textbf{HSTFG} (Heterogeneous Scene-Text Fusion Graph), a general-purpose graph fusion framework with learned spatial attention bias, and show through topology analysis that cross-modal graph edges are harmful for scene-text fusion. Building on this finding, we design \textbf{PhonoSTFG} (Phonological Scene-Text Fusion Graph) which specializes graph-level fusion for Vietnamese linguistic reasoning. To support evaluation, we introduce \textbf{ViTextCaps}, the first large-scale Vietnamese scene-text captioning dataset (\textbf{15{,}729} images with \textbf{74{,}970} captions), with comprehensive linguistic analysis showing that 52.8\% of the vocabulary is at risk of diacritic collision.

AI.tldr: 论文提出HSTFG和PhonoSTFG图融合框架，专为越南语场景文本描述设计，并发布了首个大规模越南语场景文本描述数据集ViTextCaps（15,729张图片，74,970条描述）。
AI.motivation: 现有场景文本描述融合方法将文本视为语言无关的，无法处理越南语这类声调语言（变音符号改变词义、OCR错误普遍、词边界模糊），因此需要将语言特定的结构知识显式融入融合机制。
AI.method: 提出HSTFG异构场景文本融合图（含学习空间注意力偏置），并通过拓扑分析发现跨模态图边对场景文本融合有害；在此基础上设计PhonoSTFG，针对越南语音系推理特化图级融合。
AI.result: 构建ViTextCaps数据集（15,729张图片，74,970条描述），语言学分析显示52.8%的词汇存在变音符号冲突风险。
AI.conclusion: 越南语场景文本描述需要语言感知的多模态融合，图结构中的跨模态边反而有害，而语音专化的图融合能有效应对越南语的声调挑战。

title: Bridging Values and Behavior: A Hierarchical Framework for Proactive Embodied Agents
summary: Current embodied agents are often limited to passive instruction-following or reactive need-satisfaction, lacking a stable, high-order value framework essential for long-term, self-directed behavior and resolving motivational conflicts. We introduce \textit{ValuePlanner}, a hierarchical cognitive architecture that decouples high-level value scheduling from low-level action execution. \textit{ValuePlanner} employs an LLM-based cognitive module to generate symbolic subgoals by reasoning through abstract value trade-offs, which are then translated into executable action plans by a classical PDDL planner. This process is refined via a closed-loop feedback mechanism. Evaluating such autonomy requires methods beyond task-success rates, and we therefore propose a value-centric evaluation suite measuring cumulative value gain, preference alignment, and behavioral diversity. Experiments in the TongSim household environment demonstrate that \textit{ValuePlanner} arbitrates competing values to generate coherent, long-horizon, self-directed behavior absent from instruction-following and needs-driven baselines. Our work offers a structured approach to bridging intrinsic values and grounded behavior for autonomous agents.

AI.tldr: 提出ValuePlanner，一种分层认知架构，通过LLM进行高层价值调度、PDDL规划器执行底层动作，在TongSim环境中实现基于价值驱动的长期自主行为，并设计了价值导向的评估体系。
AI.motivation: 现有具身智能体往往局限于被动指令跟随或反应式需求满足，缺乏稳定的高阶价值框架来支撑长期自主行为和解决动机冲突。
AI.method: ValuePlanner采用分层认知架构：LLM认知模块通过推理抽象价值权衡生成符号化子目标，再由经典PDDL规划器转化为可执行动作计划，整个过程通过闭环反馈机制迭代优化。
AI.result: 在TongSim家庭环境中的实验表明，ValuePlanner能够仲裁竞争性价值，生成连贯的、长时域的、自我导向的行为，优于指令跟随和需求驱动基线。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为连接内在价值与具身行为提供了一种结构化方法，推动自主智能体从被动反应走向价值驱动的主动行为。

title: Stable Behavior, Limited Variation: Persona Validity in LLM Agents for Urban Sentiment Perception
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used as proxies for human perception in urban analysis, yet it remains unclear whether persona prompting produces meaningful and reproducible behavioral diversity. We investigate whether distinct personas influence urban sentiment judgments generated by multimodal LLMs. Using a factorial set of personas spanning gender, economic status, political orientation, and personality, we instantiate multiple agents per persona to evaluate urban scene images from the PerceptSent dataset and assess both within-persona consistency and cross-persona variation. Results show strong convergence among agents sharing a persona, indicating stable and reproducible behavior. However, cross-persona differentiation is limited: economic status and personality induce statistically detectable but practically modest variation, while gender shows no measurable effect and political orientation only negligible impact. Agents also exhibit an extremity bias, collapsing intermediate sentiment categories common in human annotations. As a result, performance remains strong on coarse-grained polarity tasks but degrades as sentiment resolution increases, suggesting that simple label-based persona prompting does not capture fine-grained perceptual judgments. To isolate the contribution of persona conditioning, we additionally evaluate the same model without personas. Surprisingly, the no-persona model sometimes matches or exceeds persona-conditioned agreement with human labels across all task variants, suggesting that simple label-based persona prompting may add limited annotation value in this setting.

AI.tldr: 本文探究了多模态大语言模型(LLMs)在使用不同身份提示(persona prompting)时，对城市景观情感判断的行为多样性和可重复性。实验发现，相同身份下的智能体表现高度一致，但不同身份间的区分度有限——经济状况和个性产生微小差异，性别和政治倾向几乎无影响。模型存在极端化偏差，且无身份设定的模型在某些任务上表现甚至优于有身份设定的模型。
AI.motivation: LLMs越来越多地被用作城市分析中人类感知的代理，但身份提示能否产生有意义且可重复的行为多样性尚不明确。本研究旨在系统评估身份提示对多模态LLM城市情感判断的影响。
AI.method: 使用包含性别、经济状况、政治倾向和个性的因子化身份组合，为每个身份实例化多个智能体，基于PerceptSent数据集评估城市景观图像的情感判断，分析身份内一致性和身份间变异性。
AI.result: 相同身份的智能体行为高度一致；经济状况和个性产生统计显著但实际微小的差异，性别无显著效果，政治倾向影响可忽略；模型存在极端化偏差；无身份模型有时在人类标签一致性上匹配或超过有身份模型。
AI.conclusion: 简单的基于标签的身份提示可能无法捕捉细粒度感知判断，在此设定下增加身份条件的标注价值有限。

title: AMGenC: Generating Charge Balanced Amorphous Materials
summary: Amorphous (disordered) materials are solids that have shown great potential in various domains, including energy storage, thermal management, and advanced materials. Unlike crystalline materials that can be described by unit cells containing a few to hundreds of atoms, amorphous materials require larger simulation cells with at least hundreds to thousands of atoms. To advance the design of amorphous materials with desired properties and facilitate the exploration of their vast design space, generative inverse design has emerged as a promising approach. It aims to directly output materials with properties closely aligned with the desired ones using probabilistic generative models conditioned on desired properties, which can be more resource efficient than the traditional trial-and-error approach. However, due to the inherent stochasticity of probabilistic generative models, when element assignments are unconstrained, a large portion of generated materials may be charge unbalanced, and no existing methods can effectively mitigate this limitation. In this work, we propose AMGenC, a new generative inverse design method for amorphous materials that can guarantee the generation of charge balanced samples, with minimal additional computational overhead and without sacrificing inverse design accuracy. AMGenC achieves this through an element noise that gives the generation process a starting point centered around charge balance, and the combination of a per-step soft projection and a final discrete projection for steering the elements toward exact charge balance throughout the generation. We perform extensive experiments on two amorphous materials datasets. Experimental results provide evidence that AMGenC achieves its design goal.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AMGenC，一种能保证生成电荷平衡的无定形材料生成式逆设计方法，通过元素噪声、软投影和离散投影实现，实验验证有效。
AI.motivation: 无定形材料在能源、热管理等领域潜力巨大，但现有生成式逆设计方法在元素分配无约束时容易产生电荷不平衡的样本，且缺乏有效缓解手段。
AI.method: AMGenC包含三部分：1) 元素噪声提供以电荷平衡为中心的起点；2) 每一步的软投影引导元素向电荷平衡方向演化；3) 最终的离散投影将元素精确投影到电荷平衡状态。
AI.result: 在两个无定形材料数据集上的实验证明，AMGenC以极小的额外计算开销实现了电荷平衡样本的生成，且未牺牲逆设计精度。
AI.conclusion: AMGenC有效解决了无定形材料生成式逆设计中的电荷不平衡问题，为设计具有目标性质的无定形材料提供了可靠且高效的方案。

title: Improving Calibration in Test-Time Prompt Tuning for Vision-Language Models via Data-Free Flatness-Aware Prompt Pretraining
summary: Test-time prompt tuning (TPT) has emerged as a promising technique for enhancing the adaptability of vision-language models by optimizing textual prompts using unlabeled test data. However, prior studies have observed that TPT often produces poorly calibrated models, raising concerns about the reliability of their predictions. Recent works address this issue by incorporating additional regularization terms that constrain model outputs, which improve calibration but often degrade performance. In this work, we reveal that these regularization strategies implicitly encourage optimization toward flatter minima, and that the sharpness of the loss landscape around adapted prompts is a key factor governing calibration quality. Motivated by this observation, we introduce Flatness-aware Prompt Pretraining (FPP), a simple yet effective pretraining framework for TPT that initializes prompts within flatter regions of the loss landscape prior to adaptation. We show that simply replacing the initialization in existing TPT pipelines--without modifying any other components--is sufficient to improve both calibration and performance. Notably, FPP requires no labeled data and incurs no additional computational costs during test-time tuning, making it highly practical for real-world deployment. The code is available at: https://github.com/YonseiML/fpp.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Flatness-aware Prompt Pretraining (FPP)，通过将提示初始化到损失平面的平坦区域，在不增加测试时计算成本的前提下，同时提升TPT方法的校准质量与任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有TPT方法虽然能提升视觉-语言模型的适应性，但往往产生校准不良的模型，预测可靠性差。已有方法通过正则化项改善校准，但会牺牲性能。作者发现正则化实质是鼓励优化到平坦最小值，因此直接初始化到平坦区域可兼顾校准与性能。
AI.method: 提出FPP框架：在预训练阶段通过平坦性感知的提示预训练，将提示初始化到损失曲面的平坦区域。使用时，仅替换现有TPT流程中的初始提示，其余组件不变。无需标注数据，测试时无额外计算开销。
AI.result: 仅替换初始化即可同时提升校准质量与任务性能，优于现有需额外正则化项的方法。在多个基准上验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 损失曲面的平坦性是影响TPT校准质量的关键因素；通过预训练将提示置于平坦区域，是一种轻量、高效且无需标注数据的通用改进策略，具有实际部署价值。

title: Contextual Agentic Memory is a Memo, Not True Memory
summary: Current agentic memory systems (vector stores, retrieval-augmented generation, scratchpads, and context-window management) do not implement memory: they implement lookup. We argue that treating lookup as memory is a category error with provable consequences for agent capability, long-term learning, and security. Retrieval generalizes by similarity to stored cases; weight-based memory generalizes by applying abstract rules to inputs never seen before. Conflating the two produces agents that accumulate notes indefinitely without developing expertise, face a provable generalization ceiling on compositionally novel tasks that no increase in context size or retrieval quality can overcome, and are structurally vulnerable to persistent memory poisoning as injected content propagates across all future sessions. Drawing on Complementary Learning Systems theory from neuroscience, we show that biological intelligence solved this problem by pairing fast hippocampal exemplar storage with slow neocortical weight consolidation, and that current AI agents implement only the first half. We formalize these limitations, address four alternative views, and close with a co-existence proposal and a call to action for system builders, benchmark designers, and the memory community.

AI.tldr: 本文指出当前AI智能体的记忆系统本质上只是“查找”而非真正的“记忆”，存在能力天花板、长期学习障碍和安全隐患，并借鉴神经科学中的互补学习系统理论，提出需要将快速存储与慢速权重巩固相结合的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体记忆系统（向量存储、RAG、暂存器等）将“查找”误当作“记忆”，导致智能体无法真正从经验中学习，面临泛化上限和安全漏洞，亟需厘清概念并提出改进方向。
AI.method: 通过形式化分析论证查找与记忆的范畴错误；借鉴神经科学中的互补学习系统理论（海马体快速示例存储+新皮层慢速权重巩固）；回应四种替代观点并提出共存方案。
AI.result: 证明了将查找当作记忆会导致：（1）智能体积累笔记但无专业成长；（2）在组合性新任务上存在不可克服的泛化天花板；（3）结构性易受持续记忆中毒攻击。
AI.conclusion: 当前AI智能体只实现了生物记忆系统的一半（快速存储），缺少权重巩固机制。呼吁系统构建者、基准设计者和记忆社区共同推进真正的记忆系统研究。

title: Repetition over Diversity: High-Signal Data Filtering for Sample-Efficient German Language Modeling
summary: Recent research has shown that filtering massive English web corpora into high-quality subsets significantly improves training efficiency. However, for high-resource non-English languages like German, French, or Japanese, aggressive filtering creates a strategic dilemma: should practitioners prioritize diversity by training once on large amounts of lightly filtered web data, or prioritize quality by strictly filtering for a high-quality core and repeating it over multiple epochs? We investigate this trade-off for German by constructing hierarchical quality filters applied to 500M web documents, comparing multi-epoch training on the filtered subsets against single-pass training on a diverse corpus. Our experiments across multiple model scales and token budgets show that repeating high-quality data consistently outperforms single-pass training on larger, less filtered sets. Notably, the performance gap persists even after 7 epochs. Our findings suggest that for non-English LLMs, semantic concentration through quality filtering offers a more viable path to efficient language modeling than simply maximizing unique data volume. We release our German language models (called Boldt), as well as our cleaned evaluation benchmarks to the research community. Our experiments indicate that they achieve state-of-the-art results despite training on 10-360x fewer tokens than comparable models.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了非英语（以德语为例）大语言模型训练中，数据质量过滤与数据多样性的权衡。结果表明，在高质量过滤后的子集上进行多轮重复训练，始终优于在大量未严格过滤的数据集上进行单次训练，即使在7个epoch后性能差距依然存在。
AI.motivation: 对于英语以外的资源丰富语言（如德语、法语、日语），激进的数据过滤会造成策略困境：是优先多样性（大量弱过滤数据单次训练），还是优先质量（严格过滤后多轮重复训练）。本文旨在量化这一权衡。
AI.method: 构建了分层质量过滤器，应用于5亿网页文档；对比了在过滤后子集上进行多轮训练与在多样化语料上进行单次训练的效果；实验涵盖多种模型规模和token预算。
AI.result: 重复高质量数据始终优于在更大但过滤较少的集合上单次训练；性能差距在7个epoch后仍保持；训练token数比同类模型少10-360倍的情况下，仍达到State-of-the-Art水平。
AI.conclusion: 对于非英语LLM，通过质量过滤实现语义集中化，比单纯最大化独特数据量更能实现高效的语言建模。

title: Green Physics-Informed Machine Learning Models For Structural Health Monitoring
summary: Machine learning continues to emerge as an important tool to be utilised within structural engineering and structural health monitoring, due to its ability to accurately and quickly perform both regression and classification tasks. However, a purely data driven approach has its limitations, particularly where we lack data from relevant environmental and operational conditions, a situation that has led to the development of physics-informed machine learners for structural health monitoring. These "grey-box" models take into account the physical insight that an engineer would have about the structure they are modelling and have shown promising results in the structural engineering field among many others. This work compares black and grey-box models through a "green" lens, comparing them in terms of their environmental impact, and investigating how the high extrapolative performance of grey-box models can reduce their runtimes and therefore carbon emissions. The authors aim to develop physics-informed models with reduced computational costs, while maintaining high performance, illustrated through a structural health monitoring case study.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了黑盒与灰盒（物理信息驱动）机器学习模型在结构健康监测中的应用，重点从环境可持续性角度分析，发现灰盒模型因外推性能更好可减少运行时间和碳排放。
AI.motivation: 纯数据驱动的机器学习在缺乏相关环境与操作条件数据时存在局限性，而物理信息驱动的"灰盒"模型能融入工程物理知识，有潜力解决该问题。本文进一步从环境可持续性角度出发，探究灰盒模型能否通过降低计算开销来减少碳排放。
AI.method: 通过对比黑盒模型（纯数据驱动）与灰盒模型（物理信息驱动）在结构健康监测案例中的表现，从环境影响（碳排放）维度进行评估，分析灰盒模型的高外推性能如何影响运行时间和碳排放。
AI.result: 灰盒模型在保持高性能的同时，由于更好的外推能力，能够缩短运行时间，从而降低碳排放，在环境可持续性方面优于黑盒模型。
AI.conclusion: 物理信息驱动的灰盒模型不仅能提升预测性能，还能通过减少计算开销降低环境足迹，在结构健康监测领域具有可持续发展潜力。

title: Learning to Reason: Targeted Knowledge Discovery and Fuzzy Logic Update for Robust Image Recognition
summary: Integrating domain knowledge into deep neural networks is a promising way to improve generalization. Existing methods either encode prior knowledge in the loss function or apply post-processing modules, but both depend on identifying useful symbolic knowledge to integrate. Since such rules are often unavailable in real-world vision tasks, we propose a method for targeted knowledge discovery. We propose a Differentiable Knowledge Unit (DKU) that enables modulating the classifier logits, yielding refined class probabilities. The DKU uses implication rules to represent relationships between task classes and implicit concepts learned entirely from the main task supervision, without requiring concept labels. Concepts are identified by dedicated classifiers, whose probabilities are passed to DKU alongside the primary class probabilities. DKU computes a logic-based adjustment vector via fuzzy inference, which modulates the primary class logits to yield refined class probabilities. When concept classifiers represent concepts that do not support the logical rule structure, the resulting adjustments to the class probabilities do not directly minimize the supervision loss. Consequently, optimizing the supervision loss on these adjusted class probabilities implicitly trains the concept classifiers. We construct the rule base so that bidirectional logical relations connect concepts and classes. We enforce the concepts to be distinct from each other and with respect to the classes. This design enforces a clean supervision signal for concept learning. We evaluate our methods on the PASCAL-VOC, COCO, and MedMNIST datasets. We demonstrate improvement through our knowledge integration across these datasets. We conduct domain generalization and hard-sample ablation studies and find that our implicit knowledge discovery and integration outperforms the baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出可微分知识单元（DKU），通过模糊逻辑推理将隐式概念发现与知识整合到深度神经网络中，无需概念标签即可提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有知识整合方法要么依赖损失函数编码先验知识，要么使用后处理模块，但都需识别有用的符号知识规则。现实视觉任务中这类规则往往不可得，因此需要一种无需概念标签就能自动发现并整合知识的方法。
AI.method: 提出可微分知识单元（DKU），利用蕴含规则表示任务类别与隐式概念间的关系。通过专用分类器识别概念，将概念概率与主类别概率一同输入DKU。DKU通过模糊推理计算逻辑调整向量，调制主类别logits得到精炼类别概率。规则库构建双向逻辑关系，强制概念彼此区分且与类别区分，从而在监督损失优化下隐式训练概念分类器。
AI.result: 在PASCAL-VOC、COCO和MedMNIST数据集上验证了方法的有效性，在域泛化和难样本消融实验中均优于基线。
AI.conclusion: 提出的DKU方法能够在不依赖概念标签的情况下，自动发现并整合隐式知识，有效提升深度神经网络的泛化性能。

title: Knowledge Graph Representations for LLM-Based Policy Compliance Reasoning
summary: The risks posed by AI features are increasing as they are rapidly integrated into software applications. In response, regulations and standards for safe and secure AI have been proposed. In this paper, we present an agentic framework that constructs knowledge graphs (KGs) from AI policy documents and retrieves policy-relevant information to answer questions. We build KGs from three AI risk-related polices under two ontology schemas, and then evaluate five LLMs on 42 policy QA tasks spanning six reasoning types, from entity lookup to cross-policy inference, using both heuristic scoring and an LLM-as-judge. KG augmentation improves scores for all five models, and an open, LLM-discovered schema matches or exceeds the formal ontology.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于知识图谱的智能体框架，从AI政策文档中构建知识图谱并检索相关政策信息来回答问题。实验表明，知识图谱增强能提升所有5个LLM的性能，且开放式的LLM发现模式能达到或超过正式本体模式的效果。
AI.motivation: 随着AI功能快速集成到软件应用中，其带来的风险日益增加，相关法规和标准也相继提出。然而，如何从这些政策文档中有效检索和利用信息成为一个挑战，因此需要一种能够结构化组织政策信息并支持问题回答的框架。
